item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Café ReMix - Graceful Milotic
item.description:
21-04-2026 07:00 BST / 02:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 11:25 BSTEdit @ 11:25: Pokémon All Stars 2025

In The Music Department Pokémon All Stars 2025 A special commemorative song has been announced to celebrate Pokémon's 30th anniversary. This song is called Pokémon All Stars 1025 and is by Masayoshi Oishi and features the names of all 1025 Pokémon. This song is to come in parts and the first part, feeaturing 213 Pokémon, will be available tomorrow at 13:25 UTC. We'll provide a link to it tomorrow so be sure to check back In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Graceful Milotic event and focuses on Milotic, offering another chance to get it in the game. This event is a Café Pop-Up event event where you go through slow minute cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until May 1st We have begun compiling all details in our Graceful Milotic event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Champions Maintenance + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
20-04-2026 06:11 BST / 01:11 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 09:32 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 09:32: Pokémon Sleep

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions It has been confirmed that Pokémon Champions is to undergo maintenance on April 23rd. This maintenance is to last three hours from 03:00 UTC through 06:00 UTC. Currently details on what will be adjusted haven't been given but we'll provide full details when they come

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep It has been confirmed that Pokémon Sleep is to hold a special event to get Latios in June 2026. This follows on from the special event that has run the last two weeks to get Latias. We'll provide full details on the event and on Latios as they come available so be sure to keep checking back

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, April 21st 2026, a triple focus will be live which focuses on Pawmo's Retro Chef outfit, Umbreon's Halloween outfit and Polteageist, giving another chance to get them in the game. These Pokémon will be useful in the Graceful Milotic event

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon Pokopia - Jump Rope Contest + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
19-04-2026 07:00 BST / 02:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 BSTEdit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Event The Pokémon Pokopia Bulbasaur's Jump Rope Contest event is rolling out globally. Runs from 05:00 local time today until 04:59 local time on April 26th. This event has Bulbasaur hold a contest for Jump Rope with a number of rewards including a special trophy

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Graceful Milotic event. It is a Café Pop-up event which will run from 06:00 UTC on April 21st 2026. We'll provide full details of this event as the event goes live so be sure to check back.

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the second entry into the Champions IX competitive field with a Lumiose Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the fifth generation. Brandishing a blazing flame shaped like a serpentine spear, it rushes in to rescue its imperiled allies. So here it is, the second Pokémon, Emboar

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Hatch Day + Pokémon Masters EX - Academy Events
item.description:
18-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 07:00 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon Masters EX & Café ReMix

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Hatch Day The Pokémon GO Riolu Hatch Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Riolu will appear more in 2km Eggs from Poké Stops, with a higher chance of it being Shiny. This runs at these times: It runs from 11am to 5pm in your local time. This runs alongside Timed Research and several bonuses including half Egg Incubator distance. Thjere is a paid ticket that gives Timed Research and 25% Incubator Distance We have full details on our Replay: Riolu Hatch Day page

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Ranked Damage Event The twentieth Pokémon Masters EX Ranked Damage Event is now live. This event, Super Sparring, has you face off against one of three battles in order to earn points by inflicting high amounts of damage on the opponent. This run of it requires using the Academy event Sync Pairs. This runs until April 29th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Super Sparring event section Alongside this, two Academy Events, the Pasio Academy Opening & Best Buddies Program events have both begun a rerun to get the respective Sync Pairs. Alongside this, a Poké Fair Scout is now available to get the pairs of Lacey & Granbull, and a Triple Feature Costume Scout is available to get Rei & Hisuian Braviary, Iris & Lapras and Gladion & Porygon-Z

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The third and final bingo reward panel is now live for the Munching with Greedent event in Pokémon Café ReMix. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you a Express Delivery ticket. These need to be completed before the event ends on April 21st 2026 We have full details in our Munching with Greedent event page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until April 21st at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Hatch Day
item.description:
18-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 01:00 BST

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Hatch Day The Pokémon GO Munchlax Hatch Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Riolu will appear more in 2km Eggs from Poké Stops, with a higher chance of it being Shiny. This runs at these times: It runs from 11am to 5pm in your local time. This runs alongside Timed Research and several bonuses including half Egg Incubator distance. Thjere is a paid ticket that gives Timed Research and 25% Incubator Distance We have full details on our Replay: Riolu Hatch Day page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Samurott Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon TCG - Abyss Eye + Pokémon Wonder Voyage - Reveal + Pokémon Rising Again - Episode Details + Pokémon Night Out
item.description:
17-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 11:44 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 10:00: Pokémon TCG | Edit @ 11:24: Pokémon Wonder Voyage | Edit @ 11:44: Episode Details

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Samurott event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Samurott appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Bug Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Samurott from raids per save file This event runs until April 23rd 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game The Pokémon Company have revealed the next Japanese Pokémon TCG set. This set is Abyss Eye and is focused around Mega Darkrai. This set is due for release in Japan on May 22nd 2026 We have begun adding all cards to our Abyss Eye section with help from Toinelay for translation

In The Anime Department Pokémon Wonder Voyage The next season of the Pokémon anime has been officially revealed. This series is called Pokémon Wonder Voyage and features Liko, Dot, Roy and the Rising Volt Tacklers as well as scenes depicting elements from Poémon Sleep, Pokémon UNITE and Pokémon GO. It will start airing in Japan in May 22nd 2026

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features the Rising Volt Tacklers face off against the Explorers in Laqua. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Wonder Pick Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Wonder Pick event which features a special Wonder Pick featuring new Gastly & Wigglytuff Promo cards, as well as various missions to earn Shop Tickets to exchange for new cosmetic items themed around Mega Kangaskhan. It runs until April 27th 2026. We're currently compiling all details in our Wonder Pick Event event section

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Night Out Tickets are now available for the UK Pokémon Night Out event. This event is taking place at the O2 Arena in London, UK on November 10th and features an EDM concert of Marshmello, supported by Alison Wonderland which features Pokémon visuals and more. There are a number of different kinds of tickets available with standard ticket prices going from £77 up to £309 with standard spaces at £210. You can purchase tickets on the AXS website. Tickets for the Los Angeles event will go live later today at 17:00 UTC

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Samurott Tera Raid Battle Event
item.description:
17-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 01:00 BST

This is the Mighty Samurott event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Samurott appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Bug Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Samurott from raids per save file This event runs until April 23rd 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle + Pokémon Sleep - Spring Festival & New Moon Day + Pokémon NAIC Spectator Registration
item.description:
16-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 08:00 BSTEdit @ 05:11: Pokémon Sleep | Edit @ 06:02: Pokémon Legends: Z-A | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 08:00: Pokémon UNITE

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 10 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 10 has been announced. This season will run from April 23rd at 06:00 UTC to May 14th at 01:59 UTC. It allows use of Sub-Legendary and Mythical Pokémon but still disallows Restricted Legendary Pokémon As with the past few seasons, players will be able to get the Greninjite at Rank Y, the Delphoxite at Rank X, Chesnaughtite at Rank W, Baxcalibrite at Rank V, Sceptilite at Rank U, Swampertite at Rank T and Blazikenite at Rank S.

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The next Pokémon Sleep event has been revealed. This is the Spring Festival 2026 event and runs from April 27th at 04:00 local time through May 4th at 03:59 local time. It introduces Sandshrew & Sandslash into the game This event adds a new Salad recipe which requires Tasty Mushroom, Soft Potato, Greengrass Corn, and Plump Pumpkin, with Snorlax's dishes set to Salad and Final Strength multiplied by 1.5 Sandshrew, Sandslash, Wooper, Torchic, Mudkip, Bagon, Drifloon, Spiritomb, Pumpkaboo, Stufful, Comfey, Sprigatito, and Cetoddle will spawn more in the wild Sandshrew & Sandslash are Slumbering Ground-type Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the Growing Beyond event which will run only in Japan and Korea. This event runs from 10:00 local time on April 29th through 20:00 local time on May 5th This event has 2* Lure Module duration and increasd Candy XL from Nice Throws or better During this event, Eevee will be spawning from Lure Modules and Incense Rockruff will be in 1 Star Raid Battles Tandemaus will be in Field Research alongside Tandemaus Candy and Rockruff Candy There will be free Timed Research to get an encounter with Tandemaus, 1 Incense, 10 Pinap Berry, 3,500 Stardust and 125 Tandemaus Candy There will be 2 Collection Challenges to obtain Lucky Egg, Tandemaus Candy and an encounter with Tandemaus

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep New Moon Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on April 19th 2026 and features a special boost where Pokémon will not become hungry straight away and has an increased Shiny chance. It also features increased spawns for Darkrai and, for the first time, Mew We have all details to our New Moon Day Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE One new piece of Holowear has been released for Pokémon UNITE. This is the AuroraStyle Holowear for Suicune which is obtained by through the latest Treasure Chest Challenge event. It has special animations for every aspect.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Baking with Bewear event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Bewear's Baker outfit, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until April 21st 2026 We're adding full details to our Baking with Bewear event page

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon International Championships Registration for Spectators is now open for the Pokémon North America International Championships. These are being held in New Orleans on June 12th - 14th. A pass covering all three days cost $30 while a single day pass costs $15. You can register up to 1 additional adult and 3 additional youth attendees when you register

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a new patch in order to alter a variety of Pokémon with various adjustments to a variety of Pokémon including Mega Charizard X, Azumarill and more. It also introduces the new All Star Draft mode into the game's tournament mode where a Pokémon can only be used once overall in an entire Best of 3 or Best of 5 format We've begun compiling all the changes of this patch in our Patch section

In The Pokémon Department Poké Lids 6 new PokéLids has been officially revealed. These PokéLids are located throughout the Ishikawa. They are also available as a Pokémon HOME medal and are to be aded as part of the PokéLid Stamp Rally in Pokémon GO

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Champions - Ranked Battle + Pokémon NAIC Registration + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
15-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 07:00 BSTEdit @ 03:00: Pokémon Champions | Edit @ 06:01: Pokémon Pokopia | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon Café ReMix

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Event The next Pokémon Pokopia event has been announced. This event has Bulbasaur appear at the Pokémon Centers to run a tournament to get the highest score. This can be played alone or with other players. If you reach the high score, you can earn a special trophy item for display This event runs from 05:00 local time on April 19th through 04:59 local time on April 26th.

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions - Ranked Battle Season M-1 As part of the new structure for Ranked Battle in Pokémon Champions, the final tiers of Ranked Battle are now unlocked. This is Master Ball Tier Rank 3 through 1 and Champion Tier which are now available, following one week with them not being active. Players should automatically be placed in the ranks based on their overall rating.

In The Games Department Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness The Nintendo Gamecube Nintendo Classics app has received an update. This update is specifically made to fix a problem in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness where the game would forcibly quit and you would lose save data. Currently no further issues have been noted or stated to be fixed

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Sprigatito's Commemorative Brooch outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on April 21st 2026 We have full details in our Munching With Greedent event page

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Europe International Championships Registration for both players is now open for the Pokémon North America International Championships. These are being held in New Orleans on June 12th - 14th A second competitor wave will go live later today at 14:00 UTC / 15:00 BST / 07:00 PDT / 10:00 EDT Spectator registration will go live tomorrow at 00:00 UTC

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Masters EX - Academy Event + Pokémon GO - Sustainability Week
item.description:
14-04-2026 07:00 BST / 02:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 14:00 BSTEdit @ 14:00: Pokemon UNITE

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE The next set of playable Pokémon for Pokémon UNITE have been revealed. The three will come out every two weeks starting from April 24th 2026 Typhlosion releases on April 24th Feraligatr releases on May 8th Meganium releases on May 22nd Currently we don't have further details on the Pokémon but will provide them as they come so be sure to keep checking back

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Academy Event The "Pasio Academy Fair - Prep" Academy Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is the latest Academy Event where you get given a Sync Pair, in this case Arven & Skwovet, and have to battle through stages to earn Orbs in order to power them up. It runs until April 29th 2026 To tie in with that, a new Costume Scout is available to get the Sync Pair of Perrin & Noctowl. A second Costume Scout is also live to get Sonia & Corviknight. We're currently compiling all details in our Pasio Academy Fair - Prep event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Sustainability Week event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on April 20th. It features Galarian Corsola in an outfit, as well as the introduction of Silicobra, Sandaconda, Shiny Toedscool and Shiny Toedscruel into the game, alongside an event pass We are compiling full details in our Sustainability Week event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Champions - Coverage Day 6 + Pokémon Masters + Pokémon Sleep
item.description:
13-04-2026 05:42 BST / 00:42 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 15:58 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 09:30: Community Day | Edit @ 14:50: Pokémon Night Out

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions It is Day 5 of our Pokémon Champions coverage and our coverage is coming to a close. We have added full details already including our Pokémon Champions Pokédex being filled with all move data and more, our Champions Move Database containing all the intricate details on each move, the AbilityDex. Our section is also full of data including Ranked Battle data, Battle Pass, Trainer Customisation and more Edit @ 15:58: Created a page on Profile Badges

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions The special distribution of a Gardevoir is now live in Pokémon Champions. This distribution is available for all players who participated in 3 or more battles in the online competition, the Warm-Up Challenge this past weekend. To get it, check your ranking in the Online Competition area and it will be sent to your box

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Night Out Pokémon Night Out has been officially announced. This event provides two in-person experiences in London and Los Angeles bringing EDM and Pokémon together staring Alison Wonderland as the supporting act and Marshmallo. It is in the Intuit Dome in Los Angeles on October 24th and the O2 arena in London on November 10th. Tickets go on sale on April 17th via Ticketmaster for the Los Angeles event and AXS for the London event There will also be comemmorative merchandise from the Pokémon Center at the event In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Day Out Pokémon Day Out has also been revealed. There will be some events taking place in the summer of 2026 that are interactive and kid friendly. This will take place in Boredeaux, New York City, Dresden and Mexico City. More details are to be released in the future so be sure to keep checking back for Pokémon Day Out details.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Scopely have announced the next Pokémon GO Community Day on May 9th 2026 will focus on Lechonk. Currently further details have yet to be revealed but we'll provide further details on moves as they are revealed The Community Day runs at 2pm to 5pm in each local time zone

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next event. This event is the Pasio Academy Fair - Prep event and adds Arven & Skwovet, Perrin & Noctowl and Sonia & Corviknight into the game. It runs from April 14th 2026

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The Pokémon Sleep Latias Research event has begun its second week. With this, the Snorlax you start the week on is already at a higher Rank. New missions and item exchange options are also available We have all details to our Latias Research Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket Ranked Match season, Season B2b is now live. This is the eleventh Ranked Match season where you work up the ranks by winning in battles against random players online. After the season ends, you will get Emblems based on your position. This season runs until April 27th 2026 We have full details of the Ranked Match season, including points required for each rank in our Season B2b section.

Until Next Time, See Ya

Our section is also full of data including Ranked Battle data, Battle Pass, Trainer Customisation and more Edit @ 10:50: Updated a few minor issues and finetuned some pages

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon UNITE Championships Today is the Week 5 Day 2 of the Pokémon UNITE Regional Leagues across North America, Europe and These streams will be running all day starting at 16:00 UTC. We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between UNITE and other streams

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and seventy-fifth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Johto Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the second generation. This Pokémon can fire a tremendously powerful Solar Beam from its four flowers. Another name for this is Mega Sol Cannon So here it is, the first Pokémon, Meganium

Until Next Time, See Ya

Our section is also full of data including Ranked Battle data, Battle Pass, Trainer Customisation and more

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Community Day The Pokémon GO Community Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Tinkatink will appear, en masse, in Pokémon GO adding its Shiny into the game. During this event, when you evolve into Tinkatuff, you will get the move Gigaton Hammer. This coincides with 3* Catch Stardust, 2* Catch Candy, 3 hour Incense and more. This runs at these times: It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Tinkatink Community Day page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Champions - Coverage Day 3 + Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Tera Raid Battle Event
item.description:
10-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 03:00 BSTEdit @ 03:00: Pokémon Champions Competition

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions It is Day 2 of our Pokémon Champions coverage and it is in full swing. We have added full details already including our Pokémon Champions Pokédex being filled with all move data and more, our Champions Move Database containing all the intricate details on each move, the AbilityDex and we have a section detailing the various additions and intricacies

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions Battles for the first Pokémon Champions Online Competition have begun. This is the Warm-Up Challenge which runs standard Regulation M-A rules using all Pokémon that are currently available in the game Battles run until 01:59 UTC on April 13th 2026. This competition also gives a Gardevoir and 100 Quick Coupons to all players who complete 3 or more battles We have full details in our Warm-Up Challenge competition section

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Emboar event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Emboar appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Electric Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Emboar from raids per save file This event runs until April 16th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Champions - Coverage Day 2 + Pokémon Pokopia
item.description:
09-04-2026 05:00 BST / 00:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 16:08 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 16:08: Episode Title

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions It is Day 2 of our Pokémon Champions coverage and it is in full swing. We have added full details already including our Pokémon Champions Pokédex being filled with all move data and more, our Champions Move Database containing all the intricate details on each move, the AbilityDex and we have a section detailing the various additions and intricacies Edit @ 07:06: It is confirmed that Pokémon Champions will undergo maintenance from 23:00 UTC on April 9th through 01:00 UTC on April 10th Edit @ 08:55; Updated the Pokédex to include our top stat charts Edit @ 10:08: Created a Missions Page Edit @ 10:21: Updated the Updated Attacks page with more intricacies Edit @ 13:20: Created a page on Pokémon Titles Edit @ 14:48: Created a page on Gift Pokémon Edit @ 16:35: Created a page on Battle Music

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions Pokémon Champions has detailed various bugs that they have been made aware of which are to be fixed in a future data update or maintenance First, Leech Seed is erroneously listed as taking damage up to 1/16 of maximum HP when it takes 1/8 of maximum HP An error is occuring where Mega Evolution displays in an unintended order There is an error of some genders of Pokémon in the tutorial and in released teams There is an error where Lightning Rod won't activate when Encore is in play Thre is an error preventing the ability to select a move if you press B when hovering over Mega Evolution A bug has been fixed in Pokémon HOME where you may get a communication error when sending Pokémon over.

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Patch Pokémon Pokopia has received a new bug fix patch. This brings the game to Version 1.0.3 and needs updating in order to go online We have added full details of this patch into our Pokémon Pokopia patch section

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME A new set of Pokémon HOME medals haves been announced. These are medals that will be available at the Pokémon Master Ball League tournaments in Asia and feature designs of Mega Dragonite, Mega Charizard Y, Mega Zygarde, Mega Sharpedo and Mega Greninja April 25th & 26th - Philippines May 2nd & 3rd - Hong Kong May 9th & 10th - Malaysia May 16th & 17th - Thailand May 23rd & 24th - Singapore June 13th & 14th - Taiwan June 27th & 28th - Indonesia

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Drop Event The next Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Drop Event which features special Solo Battles with various rewards and missions to complete. It adds numerous new Promos into the game including the Slowpoke Promo card. It runs until April 19th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Slowpoke Drop Event event section.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Rising Again A new episode pair of episode titles have been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. These episodes are due to air on April 17th and April 24th respectively. Episode 134: The Ultimate Showdown! Mega Evolution!! Episode 135: Awakening! The Laquium Core of Doom

In The Games Department Pokémon Cafeé ReMix - Update Pokémon Café ReMix has announced some big changes coming to the game to evolve it further and so the game is entering a major update prep period which will stop the run of new events This period begins on April 20th and new events will not be added. Instead, the game will run through various prior events until the update is ready later in 2026 With the major update, the Staff will remain the same and your Pokémon will carry oveer The plan is to combine the three types of puzzle rules into one new mode to keep the charm while providing expansive puzzles anyone can enjoy They inntend to make it easier and more satisfying to obtain more Pokémon .

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Munching with Greedent event and adds Greedent's Commemorative Chef outfit into the game. It is a Full-Belly Adventure. It will run from 06:00 UTC on April 11th 2026. We'll provide full details of this event and Garchomp as the event goes live so be sure to check back.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Champions - Coverage Day 1
item.description:
08-04-2026 03:00 BST / 22:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 03:00 BST

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions Pokémon Champions is now live on the Nintendo Switch eShop and so our coverage is beginning. Over the next few hours and day we'll be adding full details of the game including databases and more covering all aspects of the game. Edit @ 03:16: We have updated our Available Pokémon section with a list of the available Pokémon Edit @ 03:39: We have opened our Pokémon Champions Pokédex Edit @ 03:45: Added a Ranked Battle section Edit @ 04:07: Created a section on the Battle Pass Edit @ 04:11: Created a page listing the New Mega Abilities Edit @ 04:32: Created a page on all Available Items

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions - Regulation M-A Pokémon Champions' Regulation M-A and Ranked Battle Season M-1 is now live. Season M-1 will run until May 13th at 01:59 UTC and Regulation M-A runs until June 17th 2026 at 01:59 UTC This season allows for use of the currently available Pokémon and Mega Evolved Pokémon

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Champions - Release Timing
item.description:
07-04-2026 06:00 BST / 01:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 16:15 BSTEdit @ 11:49: Pokémon Champions Gift | Edit @ 16:15: Pokémon Regional Championships

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions On Pokémon Day, it was announced that players who play Pokémon Champions before August 31st will receive a special gift of a Dragonite. However, at some point in the past week, this notice was adjusted and has confirmed that, in addition to the Dragonite all players will also receive 100 Quick Coupons. Quick Coupons are used to reduce the time to re-roll the Pokémon in Recruit Ranch. This runs at 1 Quick Coupon for every hour reduced.

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions In a post on social media, The Pokémon Company in Japan has stated that Pokémon Champions is to launch tomorrow, April 8th, at 12:00 JST. That is at 03:00 UTC, 04:00 BST, 05:00 CEST on April 8th, and 23:00 EDT on April 7th & 20:00 PDT on April 7th. We'll provide our usual full level of coverage as it comes so be sure to check back In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Europe International Championships Details have been released for the Pokémon North America International Championships which run from June 12th through 14th 2026. Registration for both Spectators and Competitors opens on April 16th at 00:00 UTC while the first wave of registration is available from 00:00 UTC on April 15th. The Pokémon Center will be open at the event as it has in previous years There will be the usual side events including, for the first time, Pokémon UNITE's Electrode Volleyball and Z-A Battle Club

NAIC Welcome Kit

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest major Pokémon Sleep event, the Latias Research event is rolling out. This event runs until 03:59 local time on April 23rd 2026. This event features the addition of Latias into the game and offers a means to earn Latias Down through sleep research to exchange for items. We have all details to our Latias Research Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Scorbunny's Spring event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Scorbunny's Floral outfit, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until April 11th 2026 We're adding full details to our Scorbunny's Spring event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Fashion Raid Day + Pokémon TCG Pocket - Community Week Missions
item.description:
04-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 15:56 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 15:56: Pokémon Pokopia Coverage

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 17 To close out our Pokémon Pokopia coverage, we have done one final large update to the item database on Serebii. We have begun implementing images showcasing every colour variant of each item that Smearguru can change the colour of with paint. We have added over 8,000 images covering hundreds of items showcasing each part that can be painted, including items that have three different areas that can be painted

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Raid Day The newest Raid Day is rolling out in Pokémon GO. For three hours in each region, Pokémon in fashionable outfits will appear in Raids on each Gym in the area With this, you will get up to 5 extra Raid Passes from Gyms and can participate in up to 20 Remote Raid a day. You will also have a higher chance of finding shiny Raikou after completion of the raid. A paid ticket is also available that gives increased experience as well as another 8 additional free Raid Passes from Gyms. It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Fashion Raid Day page

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Community Week Missions The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is a special Community Week Event Missions event which has a variety of passive missions to complete to get a variety of rewards including Hourglasses and a new Display Board. We're currently compiling all details in our Community Week Missions event section

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 1 of the Pokémon Orlando Regional Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 13:15 (UTC) / 09:15 (EDT) / 06:15 (PDT) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 16:00 (UTC) / 012:00 (EDT) / 09:00 (PDT) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 13:45 (UTC) / 09:15 (EDT) / 06:45 (PDT) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon XP & World Championships Interest List
item.description:
03-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 01:00 BST

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Serperior event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Serperior appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Grass Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Serperior from raids per save file This event runs until April 2nd 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The Games Department Pokémon The Pokémon XP and Pokémon World Championships Interest List is now live. This list will give all people a chance to be able to get a ticket for entry to the events at the Moscone Center in San Francisco, California from August 28th through August 30th 2026 The Interest List is open until April 24th at 06:59 UTC and people who are selected will be informed via email after it closes. A multiday ticket will cost $120, or $150 with Arena access on Sunday You can register on the official site at this link

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle
item.description:
02-04-2026 07:00 BST / 02:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 14:30 BSTEdit @ 09:43: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon HOME

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME - Pokémon Legends: Z-A Update The Pokémon HOME Version 4.0.0 update is now starting to roll out on Switch and mobile. This update is allowing players in within a staggered process to ease server load, with The Pokémon Company saying it can roll out up to 06:00 UTC tomorrow, April 3rd. It introduces connectivity with Pokémon Legends: Z-A, allowing for the Lumiose, Hyperspace and Mega Evolution Pokédexes to be registered with the Pokémon in the game It also introduces Latin American Spanish as a language option and offers a one time opportunity to change your overall language in the app. We have updated the Depositable Pokémon List to show all Pokémon that can be deposited now, alongside the general Pokémon Listing Edit @ 13:06: Updated the Challenges Page with all the new available challenges and updated the page to now also display the rewards for completing each challenge Edit @ 14:30: Updated the Research Tasks with full data

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME - Pokémon Legends: Z-A Update With the new Pokémon HOME update that adds Pokémon Legends: Z-A Connectivity, a new variant of a Mega Evolution is now available to obtain in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. If you put an Original Color Magearna into Pokémon Legends: Z-A, you will be able to get this variant which has a slightly different colour, replacing the dark gray colouring on Mega Magearna with white. It also has its own Pokédex entry

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME - Pokémon Legends: Z-A Update The Pokémon HOME Gift Pokémon are now live. If you deposit a Pokémon from Pokémon Legends: Z-A into the game, you will be given an Alpha Chikorita, an Alpha Tepig and an Alpha Totodile directly into your Pokémon HOME boxes through the game's Mystery Gift feature on mobile

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 9 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 9 has begun. This season is the eighth for the Z-A Battle Club and features battles to get rewards by earning points in the battle. This season runs a ruleset where no Mythical or Restricted Pokémon can be used. This season will run until April 23rd at 05:59 UTC Players who reach Rank Y to S will get the prior Mega Stones from Ranked Battle. We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 9 section including available Pokémon and rewards

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out for Europe only. This event is the An Egg-cellent Adventure event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on April 6th. It features more spawns of Chansey, Bunnelby and Exeggcute to celebrate Easter. It comes with free Timed Research We are compiling full details in our An Egg-cellent Adventure event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Pokopia - Inflatable Sudowoodo + Pokémon Sleep - Good Sleep Day
item.description:
01-04-2026 01:00 BST / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 01:00 BST

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME It has been confirmed that Pokémon HOME is to undergo maintenance on Thursday April 2nd at 00:00 UTC until Thursday April 2nd at 06:00 UTC. This maintenance will coincide with both the Switch and mobile version of the app being updated to 4.0.0. This update adds connectivity for Pokémon Legends Z-A and Pokémon Champions ahead of its launch next week When the maintenance ends, access may come in a staggered rollout for players

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Event The special Pokémon Pokopia April Fool's Day event is rolling out globally. This event runs from 05:00 local time today until 04:59 local time tomorrow, April 2nd, and allows for players to get an Inflatable Sudowoodo item, which is exclusive to this event

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle Season 41 Pokémon Scarlet & Violet's Ranked Battle Season 41 has begun. This season features a continuation of the Regulation I format. This format allows for you to use two Restricted Pokémon. It is the final season for the game and will run in perpetuity until the servers go offline Alongside this, as Season 40 is now over, the rewards are able to be collected for all players We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 41 section including available Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep Good Sleep Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on April 4th and features bonus Drowsy Power and Pokémon Experience for every Sleep Research that begins during this time period. This will give *1.5 Drowsy Power on April 1st and 3rd and *4 Drowsy Power on April 2nd It also features increased spawns for Cleffa, Clefairy & Clefable We have all details to our Good Sleep Day Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Pokopia - Cloud Island
item.description:
31-03-2026 06:35 BST / 01:35 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 17:00 BSTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 10:05: Cloud Island | Edit @ 11:40: Mimikyu in Pokémon GO | Edit @ 17:00: Pokémon Pokopia Event

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Event A new one-day only event is rolling out in Pokémon Pokopia. This event runs on April 1st at 05:00 local time through April 2nd at 04:59 local time and adds a special quiz in the game with the wild Pokémon which result in an Inflatable Sudowoodo item.

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Event A new Cloud Island has been confirmed for Pokémon Pokopia. Starting from tomorrow, April 1st, as part of a celebration of IKEA's 20th anniversary in Japan, a collaboration will go live which features the chance to go to a special island, IKEA Island, in the game's Cloud Island Virtual Mode. This will be available from April 1st through June 30th With this, special rooms in houses will be made and a version of them can be found invarious IKEA stores in Japan. There will also be a stamp rally at IKEA stores from April 18th through May 10th to get a special display. There will lso be food decoratd with Pokémon from the game at IKEA@s restaurants

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Event Another new Cloud Island has been made officially available via The Pokémon Company. This island is by Colorful Peach and is called Color Peach Island an features a variety of locales and the chance to find Pecha Berries. It is obtaned with the code 0XGP 4N31

In The Games Department Pokémon GO As part of the currwent event and their annual April Fool's celebration, Pokémon GO has added Mimikyu to the game. Mimikyu will start spawning at midnight local time on April 1st as a rare spawn In Trainer battles, it has a unique feature where it will not receive damage from the first Charge Attack that hits it, but will change to Busted Form and then have a Defense drop for the rest of battle

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the A Shockingly Good Time event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on April 6th. It features Electric-type Pokémon spawns and a GO Pass We are compiling full details in our A Shockingly Good Time event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, April 1st 2026, Mimikyu's Commemorative Chef outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Marshmallow & Chewy Gummy gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep Pokémon Sleep has revealed the next update will come alongside maintenance on March 31st at 04:30 UTC to 09:00 UTC. With this update, a variety of changes will come as well as preparation for the Latias Research event next week Absol's Main Skill will change to Charge Strength M Kangaskhan's Main Skill will activate more A new Relaxing Sound will be added: "A Stroll through the South Province (Paldea)"

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Drip and Sip with Meowstic event and adds Meowstic's Commemorative Chef outfit into the game. It is a Café Pop-up Event. It will run from 06:00 UTC on April 1st 2026. We'll provide full details of this event and Garchomp as the event goes live so be sure to check back.

In The Pokémon Department Poké Lids 4 new PokéLids has been officially revealed. These PokéLids are located throughout the Iwate prefecture and have a focus on Geodude, the ambassador for the area. They are also available as a Pokémon HOME medal and are to be aded as part of the PokéLid Stamp Rally in Pokémon GO

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Emblem Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event, the Mega Shine Emblem Event, is the latest Emblem Event which features missions based upon battling other players over the Internet. It provides special Emblems based on your performance. It runs until April 8th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Mega Shine Emblem Event event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next chapter of the Arceus Arc, alongside an event. This continuation of the story adds Korrina (Arc Suit) & Mega Lucario, and Sabrina (Arc Suit) & Mega Alakazak into the game. It runs from April 1st 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until April 1st at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 2 of the Pokémon Seville Special Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 08:00 (UTC) / 04:00 (EDT) / 01:00 (PDT) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 10:30 (UTC) / 06:30 (EDT) / 03:30 (PDT) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 07:30 (UTC) / 03:30 (EDT) / 00:30 (PDT) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon UNITE Championships Today is the Day 2 of the Pokémon UNITE Asia Champions League Finals, taking place in Yokohama, Japan concluding today. This event will begin at 00:30 UTC. We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between UNITE and other streams

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and seventy-fourth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Paldea Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the ninth generation. No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon's traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal. It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine. So here it is, the one hundred and seventy-third Pokémon, Sandy Shocks

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Pokopia - Coverage + Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Empoleon Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon TCG - Perfect Order
item.description:
27-03-2026 00:00 GMT / 20:00 EDT by Serebii. Be sure to check last Wednesday's update for our Pokémon Champions preview. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 24 Our Pokémon Pokopia coverage is almost at its end as we have most items catalogued for categories with more being added over time. This may be the last daily update showcasing the game until the next big update to the title but the Item database will be continually updated until it is complete so be sure to keep checking back.. Our section for the game is near complete with a full Available Pokémon & Habitat section, as well as a massive Item Database which is continually having locations added to, while having full recipe details. Our current task is to find more item categories and more intricate mechanics

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Empoleon event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Empoleon appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Ice Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Empoleon from raids per save file This event runs until April 2nd 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The TCG Department Pokémon Mega Evolution Perfect Order - TCG Set Release Today marks the release of the Perfect Order TCG Set. This set contains 120 cards of various Pokémon including more Mega Evolution Pokémon from Pokémon Legends: Z-A available such as Mega Starmie and Mega Zygarde Our Perfect Order card listing and the associated Cardex have been updated with the full details of all cards in this set

Until Next Time, See Ya

Just 200 costs to go and a fair few more categories

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions Alongside the previews and trailers in the last few days, a number of new Pokémon have been showcased to be in Pokémon Champions. With the playable demo now being available to play at PAX East, we have got more and so have added it to our available Pokémon section In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Paldean Wonders The new Pokémon TCG Pocket set, Paldean Wonders is now live in the game and so our coverage of this set is beginning. We're currently compiling full details of all the new additions to the game with this set so be sure to keep checking our section. Edit @ 06:15: We have added all the new Solo Battles to the sections Edit @ 06:43: We have added all the new Emblems and Themed Collections to the sections We have updated the Coins, Playmats, Sleeves, Display Boards & Binders sections with all the new cosmetics available right now

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 9 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 9 has been announced. This season will run from April 2ndat 06:00 UTC to April 23rd at 01:59 UTC. It allows for no use of any Legendary or Mythical Pokémon Players will be able to get the Greninjite at Rank Y, the Delphoxite at Rank X, Chesnaughtite at Rank W, Baxcalibrite at Rank V, Sceptilite at Rank U, Swampertite at Rank T and Blazikenite at Rank S.

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia - Nintendo Switch Online Icons The fourth and final wave of new icons have been released for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers themed around Pokémon Pokopia. This wave includes new icons for Mosslax, DJ Rotom and more

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME A new Pokémon HOME medal has been announced. This medal is for attendees of the PAX East event this weekend in Boston, Massachussets where there will be a demo of Pokémon Pokopia and one of Pokémon Champions available to attendees. It lasts from today, March 26th through March 29th 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event As part of the currently running event, an Arc Fair scout is now live to get the Sync Pair, N (Arc Suit) & Zoroark. It runs for 48 hours until March 28th 2026 We have added full details to our Post6.5 Years Celebration! Special Co-op Battle! event section

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Pokopia - Coverage + Pokémon Champions Preview + Pokémon Masters EX - Pokémon Masters Day & Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
25-03-2026 06:00 GMT / 02:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 17:00 GMTEdit @ 08:28: Pokémon HOME Medal | Edit @ 14:00: Pokémon Champions | Edit @ 16:00: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 17:00: Pokémon GO Hatch Day

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions The Pokémon Company International recently invited us to have an exclusive play through of over an hour of Pokémon Champions. As such, we were able to write a Preview where we could talk about everything we experienced, a brief dive into some of the mechanics and more. Be sure to check out our Pokémon Champions Preview We have also added a dozen Pre-Release Screenshots to our section We also have recorded this preview in video format which can be found below

Preview

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 22 Our Pokémon Pokopia coverage is coming to its conclusion with full databases having been collated. Our section for the game is near complete with a full Available Pokémon & Habitat section, as well as a massive Item Database which is continually having locations added to, while having full recipe details. Our current task is to find more item categories and more intricate mechanics Edit @ 12:34: Added 200 more Item costs bringing us up to almost 1000 of the 1400 listed, as well as dozens more item categories Edit @ 19;36: Added a load more new Item Costs and categories for favorites

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the An Egg-cellent Adventure event which runs only in European countries from April 2nd through April 6th During this event, Chansey will have a chance of having a Lucky Egg. There will also be increased chance of Shiny Exeggcute, Chansey and Bunnelby Exeggcute, Chansey and Bunnelby will spawn in the wild There will be free Timed Research tog et Lucky Egg, Experience and encounters with Exeggcute

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon Hatch Day has been announced. This event is the Replay: Riolu Hatch Day will run on April 18th from 11:00 to 17:00 local time which focuses on the Pokémon Riolu During this event, there will be 2* Hatch candy, 2* Hatch Experience, 50% Incubator Distance and increased chance of Shiny Riolu There will be free Timed Research to get an Incubator and 5,000 Experience There will be paid Timed Research which gives 1 Star Piece, 2 Super Incubators and more. It gives 25% Incubator Ditance when purchased

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME A new Pokémon HOME medal has been announced. This medal is for the Pokémon Astronomical Observatory's next stop in Koriyama which will run from April 11th through June 14th. This medal features a different design to the medal that was available in the Observatory's first run in Sagamihara last year

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX The monthly special event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. For one day only each month on the 25th, the Pokémon Masters Day event will be held. This event will give you a variety of rewards for completion.

We've updated our Pokémon Masters Day page with the details of this month's event.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun a brand new Special Pass. This Pass can be purchased in the shop and allows for you to earn points to obtain various items including Tarts and Golden Acorns, as well as obtain Inteleon in its Stylish Spring outfit

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Tepig's Commemorative Brooch outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on April 1st 2026 We have full details in our Garchomp the Dragon Chef event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

Our current task is to find more item categories and more intricate mechanics Edit @ 08:24: Added more item categories to the Item database Edit @ 08:56: Added over 100 more item costs into the database

In The Games Department Pokémon Champions The latest news for Pokémon Champions has been revealed. The game will launch on April 8th 2026 Alongside this new Abilities have been announced: Mega Meganium gets a new one called Mega Sol which lets the Pokémon use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunligh Mega Emboar gets Mold Breaker Mega Feraligatr gets Dragonize - Turns Normal-type moves into Dragon-type with a 20% boost Pokémon Champions will have a Switch 2 enhanced visual performance patch on April 8th for Nintendo Switch 2 players The first live event for Pokémon Champions will be the Indianapolis Regional Championships at the end of May Edit @ 14:25: We also have the microtransaction prices for Japan. Currently US and Europe prices have yet to be revealed Battle Pass: 1400 Yen a season Starter Pack: 980 Yen - Contains 50 Training Tickets, 30 Teammate Tickets, 50 additional box space and music from Pokémon Let's Go Membership: 700 Yen a month or 7000 Yen a year -Gives unique missions, access to music tracks, more Battle Teams and more Pokémon in the box You will be able to spend Victory Points on cosmetic items as well as items from the store

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event As part of the currently running event, an Arc Fair scout is now live to get the Sync Pair, Leon (Arc Suit) & Charizard. It runs for 48 hours until March 26th 2026 We have added full details to our Post6.5 Years Celebration! Special Co-op Battle! event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event As part of the currently running event, an Arc Fair scout is now live to get the Sync Pair, Steven (Arc Suit) & Metagross We have added full details to our Post6.5 Years Celebration! Special Co-op Battle! event section

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 2 of the Pokémon Houston Regional Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 14:15 (UTC) / 10:15 (EDT) / 07:15 (PDT) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 17:30 (UTC) / 13:30 (EDT) / 08:30 (PDT) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 14:45 (UTC) / 10:45 (EDT) / 07:45 (PDT) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and seventy-third entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Paldea Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the ninth generation. This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity. No records exist of this species being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon's traits match up with an object described in an old book.

Until Next Time, See Ya

This is the Mighty Infernape event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Infernape appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Rock Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Infernape from raids per save file This event runs until March 30th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Pokopia - Coverage Day 15 + Pokémon Sleep - New Moon Day
item.description:
18-03-2026 01:00 GMT / 21:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 01:10 GMTEdit @ 01:10: Pokémon XD

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 15 Our Pokémon Pokopia coverage is coming to its conclusion with full databases having been collated. Due to the nature of the game, full compilation may take a little while but we are compiling full information in our section and taking community input in the Serebii Discord server. If you want to remain unspoiled, do not visit the Pokopia section until you have your game. Don't worry as blatant spoilers will NOT be on the home page. We have ever increasing Available Pokémon & Habitat sections containing locations, requirements and more, and all of the Recipes and all of the Items catalogued with their own individual pages.

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 15 Pokémon Pokopia Version 1.0.2 is now live. This update brings the patch announced last week which includes a few bug fixes including the following: In Help Make a Home, Squirtle may climb a tree and be unable to progress the quest If you break blocks in Find a Pokémon Center in Bleak Beach across the bridge before Tangrow crosses it, it will impede progress. If you follow certain steps to repair another bridge, the event will not occur. In Rocky Ridges, there are some circumstances that prevent encountering DJ Rotom> In one request in Rocky Ridges, it will become unable to progress in the request to clear the roads We'll be investigating all further possible fixes so be sure to check back In The Games Department Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness The Nintendo Gamecube game Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkenss is now available to play on the Nintendo Classics: Nintendo Gamecube software on Nintendo Switch 2 for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers. This classic game has you play through and explore the Orre region to try and rescue Shadow Pokémon and stop Cipher This game cannot connect to Pokémon FireRed & Pokémon LeafGreen on Nintendo Switch & Nintendo Switch 2

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep New Moon Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on March 21st 2026 and features a special boost where Pokémon will not become hungry straight away and has an increased Shiny chance. It also features increased spawns for Darkrai We have all details to our New Moon Day Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

It runs until April 11th 2026 Alongside this, a new EX Fair scout is now live to get the new Sync Pair for this event, Marnie (Alt.) & Grimmsnarl We have added full details to our Bede and Marnie's Pursuit event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Community Day The Pokémon GO Community Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Scorbunny will appear, en masse, in Pokémon GO adding its Shiny into the game. During this event, when you evolve into Cinderace, you will get the move Blast Burn. This coincides with 25% Incubator Distance, 2* Catch Candy, 3 hour Incense and more. This runs at these times: It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Vulpix Community Day page

If you want to remain unspoiled, do not visit the Pokopia section until you have your game. Don't worry as blatant spoilers will NOT be on the home page. We have ever increasing Available Pokémon & Habitat sections containing locations, requirements and more, and over 75% of the Recipes and 80% of the Items catalogued. As with all items, recipes etc. we will be adding them periodically over the coming days and even weeks as we unlock and get more reported.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Community Day The Pokémon GO Community Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Scorbunny will appear, en masse, in Pokémon GO adding its Shiny into the game. During this event, when you evolve into Cinderace, you will get the move Blast Burn. This coincides with 25% Incubator Distance, 2* Catch Candy, 3 hour Incense and more. This runs at these times: It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Vulpix Community Day page

Until Next Time, See Ya

Edit @ 06:17: Updated the Available Pokémon pages to include full details on habitats and likes Edit @ 07:55: Updated the Items Page with nature items Edit @ 10:02: Updated the Items page with the "Other" items Edit @ 11:56: Created a page on CDs & DJ Rotom Edit @ 12:56: Updated the Items page with the "Block" items Edit @ 14:08: Started compiling lists of naturally occurring (as in there as of first load) materials and Blocks into the Locations section, starting with Withered Wastelands Edit @ 15:03: Updated the Items page with the "Buildings" items, bringing every category there. We'll continue to add newly discovered items periodically as well as descriptions so be sure to keep checking back

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Drop Event The next Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Drop Event which features special Solo Battles with various rewards and missions to complete. It adds numerous new Promos into the game including the Charcadet Promo card. It runs until March 21st 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Charcadet Drop Event event section.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Freshly Served by Ampharos event and adds Ampharo's Commemorative Chef into the game. This event is a Café Pop Up event where you go through slow cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until March 21st Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Milotic (Commemorative Chef) We have begun compiling all details in our Freshly Served by Ampharos event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

10-03-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EDT by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMT

Edit @ 07:30: Added native imagery for all the Pokémon in the gamer throughout the section Edit @ 08:42: Updated the Items Listings to include Misc. items Edit @ 09:11: Updated the Items Listings to include Outdoor items Edit @ 09:55; Updated the Habitat Database with the last two Habitats that eluded us Edit @ 13:24: Updated the Items Listings to include Utilities Edit @ 14:40: Created a page on Paint & Patterns, including a list of all items that can have their colour altered with paint. Edit @ 15:18: Updated the Cooking Page to include the final meals that we had to find

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Events The first Pokémon Pokopia event is nowlive. This first event, More Spores for Hoppip, has Hoppip appear asking for your help to get Cotton Spores that have disappeared over Dream Islands. If you bring them back, you can exchange for items to make habitats for it, Skiploom and Jumpluff. It runs from 05:00 local time on March 10th 2026 through to 04:59 local time on March 25th 2026. We have full details in our More Spores for Hoppip event section

In The Pokémon Department N Concert x Pokémon Details have been released for the coming Pokémon Classic Concert tour which will run across Japan in August. This includes a program for the tracks played. Chapter 1 has the Pokémon Red &G reen opening followd by some classical music from Grieg's Peer Gynt Suite of Morning to commemorate Grass-type Starters, Moldau by Bedrich Smetana for the Water-type Starters and end with Firebird by Stravinsky for the Fire-type Starters Chapter 2 includes more Pokémon music from Red & Green up to Scarlet & Violet and will end with the main theme for Pokémon Winds & Waves Tickets are now available Friday, August 21, 2026, 7:00pm Tokyo Metropolitan Theatre Saturday, August 22, 2026, 3:30pm Kyoto Concert HallSunday, August 23, 2026, 2:00pm The Symphony Hall, OsakaMonday, August 24, 2026, 7:00pm Across Fukuoka Concert Hall, Fukuoka

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - High Score Event A new High Score event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is the Electric & Grass Conqueror event which features battles against Electric & Grass Sync Pairs with the aim to earn the most points to get rewards. It runs until March 19th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Electric & Grass Conqueror event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, March 11th 2026, Milotic's Commemorative Chef outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Rock Salt & Condensed Milk gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 5 The first Pokémon Pokopia event is now rolling out globally. This event, More Spores for Hoppip, has Hoppip spawn in a town and take up residence in a Pokémon Center asking for you to find Cotton Spores on Dream Islands to exchange for goods. It adds Hoppip, Skiploom and Jumpluff into the game as exclusive Pokémon. It runs from 05:00 local time on March 10th 2026 through to 04:59 local time on March 25th 2026.

In The Music Department Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku: Project Voltage High The latest Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku Project Voltage High song is now available. This song is called Crossroad by kz & TAKU INOUE wjith a music video directed by Rella showcasing Miku interacitng with the protagonists for each main series Pokémon game. We have full details in our section for the song

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Freshly Served by Ampharos event and adds Ampharos' Commemorative Chef outfit into the game. It is a Café Pop-up Event. It will run from 06:00 UTC on March 11th 2026. We'll provide full details of this event and Ampharos as the event goes live so be sure to check back.

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until March 11th at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and seventy-first entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Paldea Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the sixth generation. It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future. Some of its notable features match those of an object named within a certain expedition journal as Iron Thorns.So, here it is, the one hundred and seventy-first Pokémon, Iron Thorns

Until Next Time, See Ya

We're currently compiling all details in our Bonus Week Missions event section

Until Next Time, See Ya
