item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Pokopia + Pokémon Sleep - Dream Shard Event + Pokémon Masters EX - Extreme Battle Event + Pokémon Cafe ReMix - Event Bingo
item.description:
04-03-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 06:15: Pokémon Pokopia Patch | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon Pokopia

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Coverage Day 1 With many parts of the world getting their copies today & tomorrow and the eShop now live in some regions, it is time for us to begin our coverage Due to the nature of the game, full compilation may take a little while but we are compiling full information in our section and taking community input in the Serebii Discord server. If you want to remain unspoiled, do not visit the Pokopia section until you have your game. Don't worry as blatant spoilers will NOT be on the home page. Edit @ 13:00: The game is live on the Australian eShop In the Pokémon Center, there's a 3D Printer to duplicate items based on pictures made Stereo Rotom is given its own type in the game: Electric/Normal

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia The first Pokémon Pokopia event has been announced. This event , More Spores for Hoppi, will add Cotton into the game and allow for you to befriend Hoppip, Skiploom and Jumpluff. This cotton can then be exchanged for new items which are used to make habitats for Skiploom and Jumpluff.

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia The Pokémon Pokopia Ditto Rug distribution event is now live. If you go to Mystery Gift -> Recieve via Internet before January 31st 2027, you will be able to obtain a spceial Ditto Rug for free which can be placed anywhere on your island.

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE It has been confirmed that Moltres is to be added to Pokémon UNITE on March 13th 2026. Currently we don't have full details for Inteleon such as its moves or stats but we'll provide full details as soon as they come

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Ahead of its release tonight, a new Day 0 patch has been released for Pokémon Pokopia. This patch brings the game up to Version 1.0.1 and features a variety of bug fixes into the game. Currently we are unable to determine the specific bugs fixed but you will need to update the game to go online

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The next Pokémon Sleep event has been revealed. This is the next Dream Shard Week event which runs from March 16th 2026 04:00 local time until March 23rd 2026 at 03:59 local time During this event, Dream Shards from Sleep Research are increased by 50%, the chance of Main Skills activating will be increased by 25% and the amount of Dream Shards from a Main Skill will be increased by 50% Mini Candy Boost will be available in the event

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Extreme Battle Event Event A new Extreme Battle Event has gone live in Pokémon Masters EX. This event, Take On the Original Legend, features new battles daily for the next 30 days each with special missions to obtain Move Candy Coins and Roll Cake Coins. We have full details in our Take On the Original Legend event section.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Charmander's Commemorative Brooch outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on March 11th 2026 We have full details in our Celebrating with Venusaur event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon GO - Memories in Motion & Pokémon 30th Anniversary Event
item.description:
03-03-2026 05:54 GMT / 00:54 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 14:35 GMTEdit @ 14:35: Pokémon Pokopia Developer Tour

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Following its announcement yesterday, the special Pokémon Pokopia Developer Island Tour has been released. This showcases key developers of the game including the Director Takuto Edagawa , Art Director Marina Ayano, Producer Kanako Murata, and Concept & Senior Director Shigeru Ohmori walking through a look at an island that was created Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep A new event has been announced for Pokémon Sleep.To celebrate World Sleep Day, from March 13th 04:00 local time to March 23rd 03:59 local time, you will get two reward stamps each day you stick to your bedtime, offering more rewards

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Memories in Motion season is now rolling out in Pokémon GO. This runs from 10:00 local time today to 10:00 local time on June 2nd 2026 and features differing spawns, as well as a new Special Research, GO Pass, Egg Pools, and more. It also features some big previously announced changes including the ability for all released Shiny Pokémon to be eligible to be Shiny in the wild, regardless of if they are ean evolved Pokémon We have begun compiling all details for the Memories in Motion Season in our seasonal hub

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Pokémon 30th Anniversary event which runs from 10:00 local time on March 3rd through 20:00 local time on March 9th and features a focus on Kanto Pokémon. It has a GO Pass available featuring every Kanto Pokémon evolution chain available We are compiling full details in our Pokémon 30th Anniversary event section

In The Games Department Pokémon - Plakoro The Pokémon Company have revealed a new board game, Plakoro. This game is a redo of a classic game from 1997 and is developed by The Pokémon Company and Creatures Inc. with aid from Bandai. In this game, you have got a variety of dice that you can customise with move energy types and you have to roll them and your Pokémon in order to attack your opponent. If you match the Energy for one of the Move Cards you have in play, you will be able to do damage to the opposing Pokémon. It will release in Japan soon with no international release confirmed at this time

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Pokopia - Stream News + Pokémon GO + Pokémon Masters EX - Juliana & Terapagos + Pokémon Sleep - Pokémon Day Event & Good Sleep Day
item.description:
02-03-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 18:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX | Edit @ 14:05: Pokémon Pokopia | Edit @ 18:00: Pokémon GO

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia The Pokémon Company International have announced that tomorrow, March 3rd, a special Developer Island Tour in Pokémon Pokopia will be released. This tour will showcase an island made by key developers in the game including Concept & Senior Director Shigeru Ohmori. We'll provide full details and a link for the Developer Island Tour as it comes

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO Research Day event has been announced, the Replay: Water Research Day. This event will run on March 21st from 14:00 to 17:00 local time and focuses on Lotad, Feebas and Clamperl During the event, Pokémon like Magikarp, Chinchou and Mareanie will spawn in the wild Field Research will appear with encounters for Lotad, Feebas or Clamperl There will be paid Timed Research to get tasks to encounter Lotad, Feebas and Clamperl

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The latest event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is a special event to celebrate Pokémon Masters EX's 6.5 Anniversary. It runs until April 9th 2026 Alongside this, a new EX Master Fair scout is now live to get the new Sync Pair for this event, Florian (Anniversary 2026) & Teal Mask Ogerpon We have added full details to our Teal and Indigo Festival event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Pokémon 30th Anniversary event which runs from 10:00 local time on March 3rd through 20:00 local time on March 9th and features a focus on Kanto Pokémon, including a special Pass to get Mewtwo We are compiling full details in our Pokémon 30th Anniversary event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO A special Timed Research is live for all players in Pokémon GO from today at 10:00 local time until tomorrow at 10:00 local time. This Timed Research focuses on Pokémon introduced within this season. We have added full details into our Precious Paths Finale Timed Research section.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Pass: March has started rolling out.. This will run from February 3rd at 10:00 local time through April 7th 2026. As before, a free track is available for all players who gain access, or you can purchase to get even more rewards The Pass will include encounters with Pokémon like Raikou, as well as Stardust, Candy, Poké Balls, and if you purchase then you'll get a Timed Incubator. We have begun compiling all details for Pokémon GO Pass March including encounter rewards and items

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest major Pokémon Sleep event, the Pokemon Day Celebration Event Vol. 1 event is rolling out. This event runs until 03:59 local time on March 9th 2026. This event features boosts to various Pokémon, with some boosts to Main Skills during the event, as well as increased spawns of all Starter Pokémon. We have all details to our Pokemon Day Celebration Event Vol. 1 Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep Good Sleep Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on March 5th and features bonus Drowsy Power and Pokémon Experience for every Sleep Research that begins during this time period. This will give *1.5 Drowsy Power on March 2nd and 4th and *3 Drowsy Power on March 3rd It also features increased spawns for Cleffa, Clefairy & Clefable We have all details to our Good Sleep Day Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:
01-03-2026 04:00 GMT / 23:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket, Masters EX & Café ReMix

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle Season 40 Pokémon Scarlet & Violet's Ranked Battle's final season has been officially revealed. Starting on April 1st, Season 41 will begin and the Ranked Battles will receive no further updates after the start of the season. This season will run until the game's servers go offline and there will be no monthly rankings and no rewards given based on rankings

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle Season 40 Pokémon Scarlet & Violet's Ranked Battle Season 40 has begun. This season features a continuation of the Regulation I format. This format allows for you to use two Restricted Pokémon. Alongside this, as Season 39 is now over, the rewards are able to be collected for all players We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 40 section including available Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Monthly Subscription Pokémon TCG Pocket has started its new monthly run of Subscription Missions for players with the paid subscription. With this, the shop has updated with new Coins, Playmats, Sleeves, Display Boards & Binders featuring Sprigatito Alongside this, a new exchange is live that will give players with the subscription the Quaxly Promo

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters A new trainer has been added to Pokémon Masters EX's Trainer Lodge. From now on, if you have obtained Misty & Starmie already, you have the ability to invite them into the Trainer Lodge to befriend. If you get the Friendship Level to 100, you will now be able to get the new Sync Pair, Misty & Golduck. We have updated our Trainer Lodge Topics page to include the points each topic will give you when you speak to Misty Alongside this, a new Poké Fair Scout is now live allowing you to get the sync pair of Steven & Metagross. This runs until April 1st 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has added a new Monthly Goal Pass which offers a chance to get the Pokémon Charmeleon, which has now been added into the game, as well as max out its Outfit Grade as you complete it throughout the month.

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 2 of the Pokémon Seattle Regional Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 17:15 (UTC) / 12:15 (EST) / 09:15 (PST) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 20:30 (UTC) / 15:00 (EST) / 12:30 (PST) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 17:45 (UTC) / 12:45 (EST) / 09:45 (PST) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon UNITE Championships Today is the Week 3 Day 2 of the Pokémon UNITE Regional Leagues across North America, Europe and These streams will be running all day starting at 17:00 UTC. We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between UNITE and other streams

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and seventieth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Paldea Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the sixth generation.

Its transformation ability is perfect. However, if made to laugh, it can't maintain its disguise. It can freely recombine its own cellular structure to transform into other life-forms.

So, here it is, the one hundred and seventieth Pokémon, Ditto

Until Next Time, See Ya

01-03-2026 04:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 04:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle Season 40 Pokémon Scarlet & Violet's Ranked Battle Season 40 has begun. This season features a continuation of the Regulation I format. This format allows for you to use two Restricted Pokémon. Alongside this, as Season 39 is now over, the rewards are able to be collected for all players We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 40 section including available Pokémon

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon Winds & Waves Reveal + Pokémon Masters EX - Teal and Indigo Festival + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
28-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check yesterday's update for the latest news. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 16:00 GMTEdit @ 06:53: Pokémon Champions | Edit @ 13:13: Pokémon Pokopia | Edit @ 16:00: Pokémon Regional Championships

In The Games Department Pokémon Yesterday, the new Pokémon games, Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves were revealed for the Nintendo Switch 2 for release in 2027. These games are the 10th generation of Pokémon games and introduce various new Pokémon. Our section is fully detailed with all known elements so be sure to check it out

In The Games Department Pokémon Following the reveals in the Pokémon Presents yesterday for Pokémon Champions, we've begun compiling all the known details into new pages on the site. First, we have made pages on the Online Distributions and Deposit Bonuses Edit @ 08:17: Created a page on the Nintendo Switch Starter Pack Edit @ 08:29: Created a page on the Recruiting Pokémon Edit @ 08:46: Created a page on the Battle Pass

In The Games Department Pokémon A new distribution has been announced for Pokémon Pokopia. If you purchase the Official Starter Book by CoroCoro Ichiban which releases in Japan on March 5th 2026, you will be given a Serial Code to obtain 1 Work Bench, 1 Storage Box, 10 Lumber and 5 Sturdy Sticks. This is a unique Serial Code that differs for each players In addition to that, the Poké Times Twitter is running a campaign where it will give you a Serial Code for 2 Leppa Berry, 2 Carrots and 2 Beans if you like their tweet

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The latest event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is a special event to celebrate Pokémon Masters EX's 6.5 Anniversary. It runs until April 9th 2026 Alongside this, a new EX Master Fair scout is now live to get the new Sync Pair for this event, Florian (Anniversary 2026) & Teal Mask Ogerpon We have added full details to our Teal and Indigo Festival event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Pokémon GO Tour Global event which runs from 10:00 to 18:00 local time on both February 28th and March 1st 2026 We are compiling full details in our GO Tour Global event section In The Anime Department Pokémon Rising Again A new episode title has been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. This episode is due to air on March 13th 2026 as a double episode. Episode 131 & 132: The Time Has Come! Gather, Companions!

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Celebrating with Venusaur event and adds Venusaur into the game. This event is a Full Bellied Adventure event where you go through one minute cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until March 11th Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Blastoise In addition, a new special pass is live to get Charizard and new Daily Stamps are giving Squirtle (Commemorative Brooch) We have begun compiling all details in our Celebrating with Venusaur event section In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Emblem Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event, the Paldean Wonders Emblem Event, is the latest Emblem Event which features missions based upon battling other players over the Internet. It provides special Emblems based on your performance. It runs until February 9th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Paldean Wonders Emblem Event event section

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 1 of the Pokémon Seattle Regional Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 17:15 (UTC) / 12:15 (EST) / 09:15 (PST) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 20:30 (UTC) / 15:00 (EST) / 12:30 (PST) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 17:45 (UTC) / 12:45 (EST) / 09:45 (PST) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon UNITE Championships Today is the Week 3 Day 1 of the Pokémon UNITE Regional Leagues across North America, Europe and These streams will be running all day starting at 17:00 UTC. We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between UNITE and other streams

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Winds & Waves Reveal + Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Blaziken Raid Event + LEGO Pokémon
item.description:
27-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check back later today for the Pokémon Presents news revealing the content. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 22:45 GMTEdit @ 05:00: Pokémon Horizons | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 09:53: Project Voltage | Edit @ 10:22: Character Biography |Edit @ 11:15; Episode Details | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon Presents | Edit @ 14:00: Pokémon TCG Pockets and Presents news | Edit @ 20;00: pokémon GO Tour | Edit @ 21:00: Pokémon Sleep Event

In The Games Department Pokémon During today's Pokémon Presents, the 10th Generation of Pokémon games has been officially revealed. These games are Pokémon Winds and Waves and will be released exclusively on Nintendo Switch 2 later in 2027 and will be released in Brazillian Portuguese for the first time for a main series Pokémon game The Pokémon in the game are called Browt Pombon and Gecqua The Pikachu forms are Mr. Windychu and Ms. Wavychu We have added direct feed screenshots to our pre-release screenshot page We have created a Pre-Release Pokémon page We have created a list of all Known Available Pokémon

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon During today's Pokémon Presents, details for Pokémon Champions have been released. It will release in April 2026. If you get the game early you will get a Dragonite. If you deposit Chesnaught, Delphox, Greninja and Eternal Floette infrom Pokémon HOME, you will get their Mega Stones. It will also have Pokémon HOME connectivity on release It wil feature a Battle Pass with both free and paid rewards including Mega Stones and Pokémon you can add to your roster. You can recruit Pokémon with VP earned from battles. 2,500 VP gives permanent recruitment, as does a special ticket Edit: We have added new Pre-Release Screenshots The abilities for Mega Chesnaught, Mega Delphox and Mega Greninja were revealed. Chesnaught keeps Bulletproof, Mega Delphox gets Levitate and Mega Greninja gets Protean Edit: We have added new Available Pokémon List Edit @ 22:45: The Japanese site showcased more details and screenshots. It showcased that the player can customise not only their trainer's look, but also how they throw a ball and pose at the start of a battle It also details the Membership feature. If you pay the membership subscription, you will be able to store more Pokémon, get a special frame, increase the amount of music you can pick in battle and get special missions to get various rewards

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends Z-A A new Mega Evolution has been revealed for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. From today, a special distribution will be live that gives you a special encounter Here, you will now be able to find an Unknown Hyperspace Lumiose portal to get an encounter with Mega Garchomp Z. If you manage to defeat Mega Garchomp Z, you will get its Garchompite Z Mega Stone. There is no end date given for this distribution In addition, it has been confirmed that when transfer becomes available for Pokémon HOME, a gift of Alpha Chikorita, Totodile and Tepig will be given In The Games Department Pokémon During today's Pokémon Presents, details for Pokémon Pokopia were released. This game introduces two new forms for Pokémon: DJ Rotom and Chef Dente. In addition to that, it has been confirmed that Ditto will be able to transform into Graveler and Magnemite in the game When playing with friends you can also do things such as play hide & seek Edit: We have added new Pre-Release Screenshots Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon The motif for both Pokémon XP and Pokémon World Championships 2026 has been officially revealed. With this, it has been confirmed that tickets will be available through an Interest List that goes live from April 2nd through April 23rd 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon The Pokémon Company have revealed that a special 30th anniversary celebration of the Pokémon TCG will come later this year. Starting in October, a worldwide coordinated launch of products will come with more products released later. Currently no further details have been given but we'll provide full details as they come

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the Pokémon 30th Anniversary event and is due to run March 3rd at 10:00 to March 9th at 20:00 local time This event has a GO Pass that includes encounters with Mewtwo and Kanto Pokémon. Paying for the Deluxe Pass gives you Mewtwo Candy XL as well as encounters with Articuno, Zapdos and Moltres All Kanto Pokémon may spawn in the wild during this event, including Articuno, Zapdos and Moltres Pikachu in Red's hat and Pikachu in Leaf's hat will be in 1 Star Raids Venusaur, Charizard and Blastoise will be in 3 Star raids On March 7th through 9th, the Pokémon All Out event will run. During this, almost all Pokémon that have been available in GO will spawn in the wild excludingMewtwo, Smeargle, Shedinja, Kecleon, Giratina, Zoroark, Larvesta, Volcarona, Scatterbug, Spewpa, Vivillon, Zygarde, Mudbray, Mudsdale, Cosmog, Cosmoem, Morpeko, Eternatus, Kubfu, Urshifu, Maushold, Dudunsparce, Gimmighoul, Gholdengo Incense may cause encounters with Legendary Pokémon Pikachu in all game protagonist's hats will be in 1 Star RaidsArticuno, Zapdos, Moltres, Deoxys (Normal Forme), Darkrai, Genesect (No Drive), Nihilego, Buzzwole (The Americas and Greenland), Pheromosa (Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and India), Xurkitree (Asia-Pacific), Celesteela (Southern Hemisphere), Kartana (Northern Hemisphere), Guzzlord, Stakataka (Eastern Hemisphere), Blacephalon (Western Hemisphere), Necrozma will be in 5 Star Raids Pichu, Cleffa, Igglybuff, Togepi, Tyrogue, Smoochum, Elekid, Magby, Azurill, Wynaut, Budew, Chingling, Bonsly, Mime Jr., Happiny, Munchlax, Riolu, Mantyke, Toxel will be in 2km Eggs

In The Games Department Pokémon A special product has been announced. This is the Pokémon Game Music Collection Red & Blue which is a small Game Boy style jukebox which contins 45 cards each with a different piece of music that can be played. It will be available from today on the Pokémon Center

In The Games Department Pokémon FireRed & Pokémon LeafGreen Pokémon FireRed & Pokémon LeafGreen are now available to download and play on the Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 eShops. Our section is fully up-to-date including our Pokédex for Generation 3 games as well as our Pokéarth - Kanto location database. Our FireRed & LeafGreen section is also full of details to help you play through the game Edit @ 18:18: It is also confirmed that when you beat the Elite Four, you will get given the AuroraTicket and Mystic Ticket items

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The latest event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is a special event to celebrate Pokémon's 30th Anniversary and features the story of an unusual looking Red appearing on Pasio. It runs until March April 13th 2026 Alongside this, a new EX Master Fair scout is now live to get the new Sync Pair for this event, Red (1996) & Pikachu We have added full details to our Pokémon Celebration event section

In The Games Department Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness During the Pokémon Presents, it was revealed that the game Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness will be released on the Nintendo Classics - Gamecube app on the Nintendo Switch 2 during March 2026. At present we don't have full details as to when but we'll provide them when we do.

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep During the Pokémon Presents, it was revealed that Mew is to come into Pokémon Sleep through special missions that are available from today. As you complete the missions you will get a chance of encountering Mew. This is a month long event running from now until March 30th. During each Sleep Research, you will get a chance of having Mew appear in your Snapshots for Sleep Styles. It only runs in the first Sleep Research of the day With each appearance, you will be able to complete missions and obtain Mew when the missions are complete Candy and Experience gained from Snapshot Surprise have *1.25 the usual amount and +1000 Dream Shards

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The next Pokémon Sleep event has been revealed. This is the Pokémon Day Celebration Event Vol. 1 to celebrate Pokémon Day and runs from 04:00 local time on Macrh 2nd through 03:59 local time on March 9th 2026 During this event, experience from sleep will be increased by 50% The chance of main skills activating will be increased by 25% and Final Strength of dishes will be increased by 25% Main Skills of Pokémon will be increased by 1 level for the event Bulbasaur, Ivysaur, Venusaur, Charmander, Charmeleon, Charizard, Squirtle, Wartortle, Blastoise, Chikorita, Bayleef, Meganium, Cyndaquil, Quilava, Typhlosion, Totodile, Croconaw, Feraligatr, Treecko, Grovyle, Sceptile, Torchic, Combusken, Blaziken, Mudkip, Marshtomp, Swampert, Sprigatito, Floragato, Meowscarada, Fuecoco, Crocalor, Skeledirge, Quaxly, Quaxwell, and Quaquaval will spawn more

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep During the Pokémon Presents, Pokémon UNITE has revealed that following the release of Articuno and Moltres, the next Pokémon to be made available in the game are Meganium, Typhlosion and Feraligatr. Currently we have no details on their release schedule but we'll provide them as they come so be sure to keep checking back.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Pokémon GO Tour Global event which runs from 10:00 to 18:00 local time on both February 28th and March 1st 2016 We are compiling full details in our GO Tour Global event section Alongside this a special code has gone live for a unique Timed Research. The code is: GOTOURKALOS

In The Games Department Pokémon Presents Today marks the Pokémon Presents. This is a 25 minute presentation showcasing the latest news for Pokémon. This will air from 14:00 UTC / 09:00 EST / 06:00 PST / 15:00 CET / 23:00 JST. We'll post full details of all reveals live as they happen, and host the stream here, so be sure to keep checking back A Game Music Collection will be available featuring 46 classic tracks A classic TCG set will be available simultaneously worldwide Pokémon Sleep is to add Mew Missions starting tonight Pokémon Champions will release in April DJ Rotom has been confirmed as a new form in Pokémon Pokopia that lets you pick the music in the game. COok Greedent will help you cook food in the game Pokémon Wind and Wave will release on Nintendo Switch 2 in 2027

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Presents To mark the 30th anniversary of Pokémon, The Pokémon Company are hosting a special Drone Show at 19:00 JST / 10:00 UTC / 05:00 EST / 03:00 PST. This drone show will feature a variety of Pokémon and can be watched online Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Blaziken event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Blaziken appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Flying Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Blaziken from raids per save file This event runs until March 5th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon x LEGO The first LEGO Pokémon sets are now available for release globally. There are five sets releasing today of Eevee, Pikachu & Poké Ball, Venusaur Charizard & Blastoise alongside the special sets of Kanto Region Badge Case and a Mini Pokémon Center We have compiled these sets in full including a LEGO Piece listing, with the listings being able to cross reference by piece to see what sets each piece is in.

In The Music Department Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku: Project Voltage High The latest Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku Project Voltage High song is now available. This song is called Spiral Melodies by Omoi. We have full details in our section for the song In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features Liko, Roy and Ult go to the Black Rayquaza to ask for its help. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Bonus Week Missions The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is a special 30 Days of Gifts event to celebrate Pokémon's 30th anniversary and features special gifts every day from special Pokémon 30 themed cosmetic items to booster packs. We're currently compiling all details in our Bonus Week Missions event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The latest event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is a special celebration for Pokémon's 30th anniversary offering a special battle with some strong rewards. It runs until March 31st 2026 We have added full details to our Pokémon Celebration event section

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons - Character Biography With the latest episode that aired in Japan, we have been able to update Roy's biography with a Pokémon that he obtained in this episode. Be warned as the biography contains spoilers

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons - News The second batch of episodes for Pokémon Horizons Season 3: Rising Hope are now available to watch on BBC iPlayer in the UK. These episodes continue the story of Liko, Roy and Dot reforming the Rising Volt Tacklers after Laquium is found in world and the Strong Spheres are being shipped. There are 14 episodes in this batch

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a update which adds a variety of things to the game. With this, the Pokémon Zapdos is now available to obtain as a new unique Unite License. It is the first of the new Pokémon Unite Licenses to have only one move track We're currently compiling full details for Zapdos in our Pokémon section for the game

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has opened its latest patch with a variety of changes> The most notable of which is the new Solo battle mode. This battle mode has you play through set stages against NPC players with special missions to complete for each stage to get a variety of rewards. Alongside this, a new log-in bonus is now live which will give you the UNITE Licenses of Venusaur, Charizard, Blastoise and Mewtwo X as you log in over various days The new move decision feature is also now live. From today, you now have to decide the Pokémon's move chain before the battle starts

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon TCG Pocket - Paldean Wonders + Pokémon Masters EX - Update + Pokémon GO Pass
item.description:
26-02-2026 01:00 GMT / 20:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 15:13 GMTEdit @ 06:28: Pokémon Masters | Edit @ 09:42: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 15:13: Episode Title

In The Games Department Pokémon 30 It is now Pokémon Day in Japan and with that, a myriad of small bits of information has been released including more Pokémon 30 logos and a special video commemorating the 30th anniversary Alongside this, it has been confirmed that, for Japan, each month has got a special theme that merchandise and campaigns will be focused around. The first month is Beginnings while next month will be about Songs. We'll provide full details on any reveals as they come

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Paldean Wonders The new Pokémon TCG Pocket set, Paldean Wonders is now live in the game and so our coverage of this set is beginning. We're currently compiling full details of all the new additions to the game with this set so be sure to keep checking our section. Edit @ 02:24: We have added all the new Emblems and Themed Collections to the sections Edit @ 08:49: We have added all the new Solo Battles to the sections We have updated the Coins, Playmats, Sleeves, Display Boards & Binders sections with all the new cosmetics available right now

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has received an update for the coming month's events. This includes a fix as to where to exchange Roll Cake Coins, as well as the coming data. This includes data for the Sync Pairs of Red, Florian, Juliana, Misty, Marnie & Bede

In The Anime Department Pokémon Rising Again A new episode title has been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. This episode is due to air on March 6th 2026. Episode 130: Hamber on the Night of the Blood Moon

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Pokémon GO has announced a new Pro Baseball collaboration for Japan. In 12 different games from April 3rd through August 23rd, a special bonus will run. This gives Timed Research to get a special Pikachu with a Baseball Shirt, and you will also find Pikachu in Raid Battles which could have a Location Background.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Pass: March has been announced. This will run from March 3rd 2026 through April 7th 2026. As before, a free track is available for all players who gain access, or you can purchase to get even more rewards The Pass will include encounters with Pokémon like Raikou, as well as Stardust, candy, Poké Balls, and if you purchase then you'll get a Timed Incubator, additional encounters and premium items At Rank 25 you will be able to open 40 gifts a day, receive up to 125 gifts a day and hold up to 30 gifts in your bag. If you get the Deluxe pass, you will be able to open 50 a day, receive up to 150 a day from PokéStops and Gyms and hold up to 40 in your bag At Rank 50 you will get 2* Daily Adventure Incense duration At Rank 75 you will get increased Stardust & Experience from Eggs

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Jets As part of the continual campaign of Pokémon themed Aeroplanes with ANA, and other airlines through the world, it has been announced that to celebrate Pokémon's 30th anniversary, three new jets will be revealed. They are themed around Pokémon Red, Pokémon Green and Pokémon Blue and are called the Pokémon Jet Red, Green and Blue. Currently their design hasn't been revealed

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon TCG Pocket - Paldean Wonders
item.description:
26-02-2026 01:00 GMT / 20:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 02:24 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Secluded Springs The new Pokémon TCG Pocket set, Paldean Wonders is now live in the game and so our coverage of this set is beginning. We're currently compiling full details of all the new additions to the game with this set so be sure to keep checking our section. Edit @ 02:24: We have added all the new Emblems and Themed Collections to the sections

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Pass: March has been announced. This will run from March 3rd 2026 through April 7th 2026. As before, a free track is available for all players who gain access, or you can purchase to get even more rewards The Pass will include encounters with Pokémon like Raikou, as well as Stardust, candy, Poké Balls, and if you purchase then you'll get a Timed Incubator, additional encounters and premium items At Rank 25 you will be able to open 40 gifts a day, receive up to 125 gifts a day and hold up to 30 gifts in your bag. If you get the Deluxe pass, you will be able to open 50 a day, receive up to 150 a day from PokéStops and Gyms and hold up to 40 in your bag At Rank 50 you will get 2* Daily Adventure Incense duration At Rank 75 you will get increased Stardust & Experience from Eggs

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon GO - Bug Out + Pokémon Café ReMix - Flapple's Apple Festival + Pokémon Masters Day
item.description:
25-02-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 18:00 GMTEdit @ 18:00: Bug Out

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the Into the Depths event and is due to run March 17th at 10:00 to March 2rd at 20:00 local time and adds Blipbug, Dottler & Orbeetle alongside Shiny Sizzlipede & Centiskorch into the game During this event there will be different Pokémon obtained from Lure Modules durig the event. Paras and Sizzlipede will run on March 17th - 19th Cutiefly and Sizzlipede will run on March 19th - 21st Combee and Sizzlipede will run on March 21st - 23rd There will also be bonuses for hitting the GO Pass milestones Tier 1: 2* XP for successfully catching Pokémon with Nice Throws or better Tier 2: 2* Catch Candy, GO Pass Deluxe: 3* Catch Candy Caterpie, Dwebble, Sizzlipede, Nymble and Scyther will spawn in the wild Blipbug will be in 1 Star Raids Pinsir, Scizor & Kleavor will be in 3 Star Raids The GO Pass will run during this event for free with the paid track costing $4.99. This pass includes encounters with Blipbug & event Pokémon, Stardust, Experience, Lure Modules, Great Balls and more. The Deluxe Pass has more encounters, Premium Battle Passes, Lure Modules, Rare Candy XL, Candy XL and more

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Flapple's Apple Festival event and gives a chance to get Flapple into the game. This event is a Gourmet Battle event which has you complete stages against Team Crunch. This event runs until February 27th We have begun compiling all details in our Flapple's Apple Festival event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO As part of a social media campaign, Pokémon GO has released a special code to get Timed Research focusing on Unown Y. This Timed Research is short and is obtained with the code =6K343X373BDQM for Unown Y and 2PKXPAT2RJXKL for Unown Z & Unown A. We have added full details into our Timed Research section.

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX The monthly special event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. For one day only each month on the 25th, the Pokémon Masters Day event will be held. This event will give you a variety of rewards for completion.

We've updated our Pokémon Masters Day page with the details of this month's event.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon GO - Memories in Motion & Community Day + Pokémon Sleep - Update + Pokémon Café ReMix - Next Event
item.description:
24-02-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 21:00 GMTEdit @ 08:56: Pokémon Sleep | Edit @ 14:00: Pokémon GO Season | Edit @ 17;17: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 21:00: Pokémon Pokopia

In The Games Department Nintendo Treehouse Live Today is the Nintendo Treehouse Live stream featuring Pokémon Pokopia. This stream runs from 14:00 PST / 17:00 EST / 22:00 UTC / 23:00 CEST and features around 80 minutes of play of Pokémon Pokopia and Super Mario Bros. Wonder Nintendo Switch 2 Edition. We'll be adding all new discoveries from the stream so be sure to keep checking back When you destroy blocks, you get them as items to repurpose later such as dirt, sand etc. The Dowsing Machine can be used with Pokémon with the Specialty Search in order to help find items hidden in the terrain Some buildings such as Leaf Dens have a transition and have you enter them to put in furniture. You can also relocate Pokémon to various buildings away from their habitat. Their comfort level increases more in homes that are built for them Buildings can be made with kits or block by block. If two blocks high it can be considered a building. Electricity is in the game and generated through things such as a windmill The Grow Specialty on Pokémon like Bellsprout to speed up the growth of plants

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Scopely have announced the next Pokémon GO Community Day on March 14th 2026 will focus on Scorbunny. This event will 25% Incubator Distance, 2* Catch Candy and double the chance to get XL Candy as well as 3 hours Incense and Lure Modules. It will also give out the move Blast Burn to Cinderace, and Cinderace will also know Pyro Ball from this event. You will be able to purchase a ticket to receive Special Research . The Community Day runs at 2pm to 5pm in each local time zone

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO events for March 2026 have been fully detailed. Articuno, zapdos & Moltres will be in Raid Battles from March 4th - 10th alongside Mega Pinsir Zacian will be in Raid Battles from March 11th - 17th alongside Mega Steelix Zamazenta will be in Raid Battles from March 18th - 24th alongside Mega Slowbro Regieleki will be in Raid Battles from March 25th - 31st alongside Mega Houndoom Pikachu will be in Max Battles from March 9th and Regice from March 23rd Shadow Latias will be in Shadow Raids Events have also been announced An event will run from March 3th through March 9th An event will run from March 10th through March 16th The Bug Out event will run from March 17th through March 23rd An event will run from March 31st through April 6th

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO Season, Memories in Motion, has been fully detailed. As revealed yesterday, this season will run from March 3rd 2026 through June 2nd 2026. This adds Orbeetle & Gigantamax Pikachu into the game With this season, event pacing will be adjusted to a regular schedule and weekend events will all run on Saturdays With this season there are also daily bonuses from midnight to midnight each day. Double-Time Sundays have Lure Modules and Incense last twice as long On Mondays, you will get 2* GO Points from Pass Tasks for both monthly and event GO Passes Tuesdays will have PokéStop Showcases with up to 20 different categories Wednesdays have Raid Hours Thursdays have GO Battle Thursdays which increase the amount of sets you can play a day and increases the reward Stardust to up to 48 Fridays are Friendship Fridays with two Special Trades on the day and increased chance of a Lucky Trade, as well as a 10% Reduction in cost of trades and 2 guaranteed Candy XL All Wild Pokémon and Shadow Pokémon of species that have had their Shiny introduced into the game will be able to be Shiny in encounters, regardless of if they are evolved There will b Special Research throughout the season, Pressure Rising, which will give players a chance to get Volcanion. If they previously got Volcanion, they will get Candy instead. Gyarados, Honedge, Dhelmise, Sinistea, Duraludon and Dreepy will be in Research Breakthroughs

In The Games Department Pokémon GO As part of a social media campaign, Pokémon GO has released a special code to get Timed Research focusing on Unown X. This Timed Research is short and is obtained with the code QFWM3SRJPVRY5. We have added full details into our Bonus Timed Research - Unown X section.

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The Pokémon Sleep update is now live and the maintenance is over. This update adds fixes to some Pokémon including changing Pinsir and Heracross' Main Skills and alteration of the Charge Strength S and Charge Strength M skills. It also adds the Bulk Up (Cooking Assist S) skill. Our section has been fully updated with all the details.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Flapple's Apple Festival and gives a new chance to get Flapple into the game. It is a Gourmet Battle Event. It will run from 06:00 UTC on February 25th 2026. We'll provide full details of this event as the event goes live so be sure to check back.

Until Next Time, See Ya

We're currently creating a Pokémon 30th Annievrsary page that will detail all celebrations etc. throughout the year, and we are adding all the logos to it so be sure to check out our new section

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon TCG - Ninja Spinner Reveals + Pokémon GO + Pokémon of the Week
item.description:
22-02-2026 06:15 GMT / 01:15 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 10:00: Road to KalosEdit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game The Pokémon Company have revealed a new batch of cards the next Japanese Pokémon TCG set, Ninja Spinner, which releases next month on March 13th 2026. This batch of cards include Mega Floette ex and a variety of others We have begun adding all the revealed cards into our Ninja Spinner section, with translations thanks to ToineLay

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Road to Kalos event which runs from 00:00 local time on February 23rd through 23:59 local time on February 27th and features daily sapwns and raids with unique Location Cards. It also features the GO Pass: Road to Kalos which runs from 10:00 local time on February 23rd We are compiling full details in our Road to Kalos event section In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-ninth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Paldea Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the sixth generation.

They say that flower gardens created by Florges constantly emit a power that can heal both body and spirit. It is said that there was once a Florges that protected the garden of a castle for over 300 years. When Florges attacks, its orange flowers fire off powerful beams as if they were a battery of artillery. Blue pigments were tremendously expensive in the past, so paintings of blue Florges are highly valuable. A flower garden made by a white-flowered Florges will be beautifully decorated with flowering plants of many different colors.

So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-ninth Pokémon, Florges

Until Next Time, See Ya

The first Battle Pass will go live on March 1st 2026 and will add one new piece of Holowear: Knight Style Latios among various other items Later, in April, the 40th Battle Pass will go live which adds the Knight Style Holowear for Latias

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Sceptile Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon GO Tour + Pokémon UNITE - Updates + Pokémon Sleep - Update + Pokémon Masters EX + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
20-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 10:45 GMTEdit @ 05:00: Pokémon UNITE & Sleep | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX & Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 06:30: Pokémon FireRed & LeafGreen | Edit @ 08:00: Pokémon Presents | Edit @ 09;03: Pokémon Sleep | Edit @ 10:14: Character Biography | Edit @ 10;39: Episode Details | Edit @ 10:45; Mega Night

In The Games Department Pokémon Presents A Pokémon Presents has been announced. This Pokémon Presents will air on February 27th at 14:00 UTC / 09:00 EST / 06:00 PST / 15:00 CET / 23:00 JST. It's currently unclear what it will feature but it will last 25 minutes as part of this year's Pokémon Day celebrations.

In The Games Department Pokémon FireRed & Pokémon LeafGreen Pokémon FireRed & Pokémon LeafGreen have been added to the Nintendo Switch eShop with pre-orders. Release is currently set for February 27th 2026 and will cost £16.99/$19.99 to purchase. These games require 40MB to download and have local wireless support with the Pokémon Wireless Club and support to battle and trade. The games do not feature online play. Pokémon HOME support will come soon Edit: The release has been confirmed to unlock following the Pokémon Presents on February 27th 2026 Edit: The note about Pokémon HOME connectivity has been removed. Currently we're unclear as to why but we'll provide full details as they come

Footage

In The Apps Department Nintendo Music The app, Nintendo Music, available on iOS and Android for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers, has added the full soundtrack for the game, Pokémon FireRed & Pokémon LeafGreen to celebrate the announcement of the re-releases on Nintendo Music. This contains all 64 tracks from throughout the game

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Sceptile event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Sceptile appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Dragon Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Sceptile from raids per save file This event runs until February 26th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features the Dot deciding to step back and take a more support role rather than as a Tera Trainer, but Iono arrives to convince her otherwise. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons - Character Biography With the latest episode that aired in Japan, we have been able to update Dot's biography with a Pokémon that she obtained in this episode. Be warned as the biography contains spoilers

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Tour Mega Night event is now rolling out. This event features a variety of Mega Evolution themed spawns and Mega Raids, including the introduction of Mega Dragonite into the game. We have begun compiling full details in our GO Tour Kalos Mega Night section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The first Pokémon GO Tour live event in Tainan is now rolling out. This is a three day event that has a focus around Kalos and Kalos Pokémon, adding Mega Victreebel & Mega Malamar into the game via Super Mega Raids, alongside various new Shiny Pokémon. It also features Masterwork Research to get Shiny Diancie. We have begun compiling full details in our GO Tour Kalos Tainan section

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep To comemmorate Pokémon Day, a special event bonus has been announced for Pokémon Sleep. For Sleep Research on February 26th, all Drowsy Power will be increased by a factor of 1.5 to help give boosts and improved Pokémon from Sleep Research

In The Games Department Pokémon GO To celebrate Pokémon GO Tour, a new code have been released for Timed Research that will get you a variety of Fairy-type Pokémon Very Fairy Timed Research: TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has announced a myriad of changes coming to the game starting February 27th 2026. First, Pokémon moves will be decided outside of battle before the battle begins, meaning you can't change the intended moves in battle. Some Pokémon will also only have one move path as you go through Unite Licenses will be changed so new licenses with 1 Move Path will cost 590 Gems They intend to release 2 Pokémon a month in the game A new battle mode, Solo Mode, is going to be released. This mode has you go through prepared stages to earn rewards including Rental Licenses, License Points and more. The stages will have specific requirements for completion suich as defeating Altaria 3 times and more. Each stage has Combat Power set as a guideline for difficulty. You can increase your Combat Power by increasing the level of hold items and the mode exclusive Aeos Shooter A special Super Panic Parade will be held which focuses on Kanto Pokémon to celebrate Pokémon's 30th anniversary

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep Pokémon Sleep has revealed the next update will come alongside maintenance on February 24th at 04:30 UTC to 09:00 UTC. With this update, a variety of changes will come Pinsir's Main Skill will change to Charge Strength M Heracross's Main Skill will change to Bulk Up (Cooking Assist S) which gets you ingredients chosen at random. Also raises your Extra Tasty rate by a small amount. The effectiveness of Charge Strength S, Charge Strength M and Bad Dreams (Charge Strength M) at level 7 will be adjusted

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The first Pasio Gym Battle event is now live in Pokémon Masters EX. This event has you work alongside your team to defeat the Gym Leaders to earn points to get a variety of rewards including Vouchers to exchange and Superawakening Candy. It runs until February 27th 2026 We have added full details to our Kanto Gym Leaders Assembled event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Battles for the next Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Online Competition hasvebegun. This is the Grand Challenge V competition and is the fourth online competition of the season that give players a chance to earn Championship Points towards their 2026 Pokémon World Championships invite. This competition runs Regulation F rules Battles run until 23:59 UTC on February 22nd 2026. This competition also gives 100,000 League Points, a Gold Bottle Cap and an Ability Patch to all players who complete 3 or more battles

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, February 21st 2026, Fidough's Bread Basket outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Ice Pop & Parchment Paper gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 7 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 6 has begun. This season is the sixth for the Z-A Battle Club and features battles to get rewards by earning points in the battle, and allows for use of Mythical Pokémon and adds in the ability to use up to 2 Restricted Legendary Pokémon. This season will run until March 12th at 05:59 UTC Players who reach Rank Y to T will get the prior Mega Stones from Ranked Battle while reaching Rank S will give the Blazikenite, which adds Mega Blaziken into the game. We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 7 section including available Pokémon and rewards

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket The latest set for Pokémon TCG Pocket has been officially revealed. This set is called Paldean Wonders and will release on February 26th 2026 and focuses on Pokémon from the Paldea region A Charcadet Drop Event will run from mid March to late March A Wonder Pick event featuring a Pawmi Promo card and Arven cosmetics will also run from Mid March to Late March We have created a page for this new set. It can be found in our new Paldean Wonders set page

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE It has been confirmed that the Legendary Pokémon, Articuno, Zapdos and Moltres are to be added as playable characters in Pokémon UNITE. This is to begin with Zapdos on February 27th 2026. Currently no further details have been given for these Pokémon but we'll provide full details as they come

To bring us to Pokémon Day and to the 6.5 anniversary of the game, daily battles will be available to get players Gems, Sync Orbs and more items. It runs until February 27th 2026 We have added full details to our Run-Up to 6.5 Years Battle Countdown event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The third and final bingo reward panel is now live for the Chilly Vanillite event in Pokémon Café ReMix. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Vanillite's Stylish Crème Brûlée outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on February 21st 2026 We have full details in our Chilly Vanillite event page

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Masters EX - Arceus Event + Pokémon GO - Lunar New Year
item.description:
17-02-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The latest Pokémon Masters EX event has begun. This includes Chapter 8 of the Arceus Arc story. Alongside this, several events have also begun The Arceus Arc Celebration Special Battle Event has begun. This event features just battles to earn points that are exchanged for items to help power up the Arc Suit Sync Pairs. It runs until February 28th 2026 To tie in with that, a new Arc Fair Scout is available to get the Sync Pair of Misty (Arc Suit) & Starmie We have added full details to our Arceus Arc Celebration event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced a new game mode is coming soon, the Pasio Gym Battle. This mode has players in a Gym work together to take on 8 Gym Leaders. The opponent's HP carries over to the next time a Gym Member challenges them. Gym Members can cheer you on and your moves get boosted by 50%. It then offers rewards based on combined Score to get Lucky Cookies, Scout Tickets and Certificates of Excellence. Group rankings offer titles, Gym Battle Vouchers and Superawakening Candy. It will begin on February 20th 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Lunar New Year 2026 event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on February 22nd. This event has a few bonuses including Shiny Gimmighoul alongside a Collection Challenge and paid Timed Research We have full details in our Lunar New Year 2026 event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Special Sync Pair Event The "Clavell & Sprigatito" Special Sync Pair Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is a new Sync Pair Event and is focused around getting you vouchers to exchange for items to power up the Sync Pair of Clavell (Alt.) & Sprigatito, adding it into the game. We have all details in our Clavell & Sprigatito event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Online Icons + Pokémon Masters EX - Arc Event News + Pokémon Sleep - New Moon Day
item.description:
16-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 20:00 GMTEdit @ 01:01: NSO Icons | Edit @ 03:00: Pokémon Masters EX | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 20:00: Pokémon GO

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Online Icons The fourth and final wave of new icons have been released for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. These can be purchased for Platinum Points and used to make your own custom icons. This wave runs for a week until 00:59 UTC on February 16th and includes Mega Feraligatr, Eternal Flower Floette, Zygarde Complete Forme, Mega Gardvoir, Taunie, Urbain, Mable, Griselle, Grisham, Hoopa and Ansha

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next chapter of the Arceus Arc, alongside an event. This continuation of the story adds Brock (Arc Suit) & Onix, and Misty (Arc Suit) & Starmie into the game. It runs from February 17th 2026

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Lunar New Year 2026 event which runs from 10:00 local time on February 17th through 20:00 local time on February 22nd and features a focus on various Red Pokémon as well as Horse Pokémon. It also features an increased chance to get Shiny Gimmighoul We are compiling full details in our Lunar New Year 2026 event section In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep New Moon Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on February 19th 2026 and features a special boost where Pokémon will not become hungry straight away and has an increased Shiny chance. It also features increased spawns for Darkrai We have all details to our New Moon Day Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix A Pair of Toucannon event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Toucannon, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until February 21st 2026 We're adding full details to our A Pair of Toucannon event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon GO - Gigantamax Meowth Day
item.description:
15-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Wonder Pick Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Wonder Pick event which features a special Wonder Pick featuring new Cinderace & Alolan Vulpix Promo cards, as well as various missions to earn Shop Tickets to exchange for new cosmetic items themed around Toxtricity. It runs until February 25th 2026. We're currently compiling all details in our Wonder Pick Event event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Max Battle Day The Pokémon GO Gigantamax Meowth Max Battle Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, all Power Spots will contain a Gigantamax Meowth Max Battle. It also features Timed Research for paid ticket holders that offers experience and Max Mushrooms It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details in our Gigantamax Meowth Max Battle Day page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Piplup's Stylish Crème Brûlée outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on February 21st 2026 We have full details in our Chilly Vanillite event page

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 3 of the Pokémon Europe International Championships. Today features finals for each of the four games starting with Pokémon UNITE, then Pokémon GO, then Pokémon TCG and finally Pokémon VGC with the Closing Ceremony following The stream will begin at 09:00 UTC / 04:00 EST / 01:00 PST We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-eighth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Paldea Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the ninth generation. This Pokémon was brought to Paldea long ago by people from a faraway land. It's so strong that it can easily pull an airplane. Copperajah are prideful, cantankerous Pokémon. Specimens with vibrant green skin command the respect of others of their kind. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-eighth Pokémon, Copperajah

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Therian Forme Enamorus Raid Day
item.description:
14-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Raid Day The newest Raid Day is rolling out in Pokémon GO. For three hours in each region, Therian Forme Enamorus will appear in Raids on each Gym in the area With this, you will get up to 5 extra Raid Passes from Gyms and can participate in up to 20 Remote Raid a day. You will also have a higher chance of finding shiny Raikou after completion of the raid. A paid ticket is also available that gives increased experience as well as another 8 additional free Raid Passes from Gyms. It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Therian Forme Enamorus Raid Day page

Until Next Time, See Ya
