item.description:
13-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Feraligatr event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Feraligatr appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Dark Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Feraligatr from raids per save file This event runs until February 19th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Online Competition + Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle
item.description:
12-02-2026 05:03 GMT / 00:03 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 7 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 7 has been announced. This season will run from February 19th at 06:00 UTC to March 12th at 01:59 UTC. It also allows for use of Lumiose Pokédex #001-232 and Hyperspace Pokédex #001 - 132, allowing one Restircted Legendary Pokémon on your team Players will be able to get the Greninjite at Rank Y, the Delphoxite at Rank X, Chesnaughtite at Rank W, Baxcalibrite at Rank V, Sceptilite at Rank U, Swampertite at Rank T and Blazikenite at Rank S, adding Mega Blaziken into the game

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Drop Event The next Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Drop Event which features special Solo Battles with various rewards and missions to complete. It adds numerous new Promos into the game including the Mega Medicham ex Promo card. It runs until Febuary 22ndh 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Mega Medicham ex Drop Event event section. In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Registration for the next Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Online Competition has begun. This is the Grand Challenge V competition and is the fourth online competition of the season that give players a chance to earn Championship Points towards their 2026 Pokémon World Championships invite. This competition runs Regulation F rules Registration runs until February 19th at 23:59 UTC with battles following on February 20th - 22nd. This competition also gives 100,000 League Points, a Gold Bottle Cap and an Ability Patch to all players who complete 3 or more battles

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Pokopia Preview + Pokémon Café ReMix - Chilly Vanillite + Pokémon TCG Pocket - Ranked Battle
item.description:
11-02-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 14:00 GMTEdit @ 14:00: Pokémon Pokopia Preview

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia Nintendo recently invited us to have an exclusive play through of over an hour of Pokémon Pokopia. As such, we were able to write a Preview where we could talk about everything we experienced, a brief dive into some of the mechanics and more. Be sure to check out our Pokémon Pokopia Preview We have also added a dozen Pre-Release Screenshots to our section We also have recorded this preview in video format which can be found below

Preview

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Chilly Vanillite event and adds Vanillite into the game. This event is a Full Bellied Adventure event where you go through one minute cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until February 21st Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Tinkaton (Confectioner) We have begun compiling all details in our Chilly Vanillite event section

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket Ranked Match season, Season B2 is now live. This is the ninth Ranked Match season where you work up the ranks by winning in battles against random players online. After the season ends, you will get Emblems based on your position. This season runs until February 25th 2026 We have full details of the Ranked Match season, including points required for each rank in our Season B2 section.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Masters EX - Good Ol' Rika Here + Pokémon GO - Valentine's Day + Pokémon Café ReMix - Delivery
item.description:
10-02-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 16:00 GMTEdit @ 09:06: Pokémon Pokopia | Edit @ 16:00: Pokémon GO Truck at EUIC

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia It has been confirmed that a playable demo for Pokémon Pokopia will be available at the 2026 Europe International Championships this weekend, February 13th to 15th, at the London ExCeL. This is the first time that the game will be playable by the public. Alongside this, there will also be demo stations for Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch 2 Edition

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Europe International Championships - Merchandise Reveal It has been confirmed that the Pokémon GO Truck is to be stationed at EUIC this weekend. Each dfay from 10am to 6pm, the truck will be outside the main entance of the London ExCeL for anyone to see. When there, there will also be some swag and goodies for people, and you won't need a pass for the competition to access it

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Valentine's Day 2026 event which runs from 10:00 local time on February 10th through 20:00 local time on February 15th and features the return of Heart Trim Furfrou and Spinda #9. It also runs a Global Challenge to unlock Timed Research We are compiling full details in our Valentine's Day 2026 event section In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The "Good Ol' Rika Here" Story Event has begun a repeat run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event focuses on Rika arriving on Pasio wanting Clodsire to be the face of a bnew sweet in pasio. It runs until February 28th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Good Ol' Rika Here event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, February 11th 2026, Tinkaton's Confectioner outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Rock Salt & Chocolate Whip gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Icons + Pokémon Sleep - Valentine's Day + Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Online Competition + Pokémon 30
item.description:
09-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 02:02 GMTEdit @ 00:29: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet | Edit @ 00:35: Pokémon30 | Edit @ 01:01: NSO Icons | Edit @ 01:12: Pokémon Café

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Online Icons The third wave of new icons have been released for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. These can be purchased for Platinum Points and used to make your own custom icons. This wave runs for a week until 00:59 UTC on February 16th and includes Mega Emboar, Mega Hawlucha, Zygarde 10% Forme, Mega Lucario Z, Lebanne, Jacinthe, Philippe, Korrina, Lida and Corbeau We have added full details to our Nintendo Switch Online section

In The Games Department Pokémon 30 Details for the Pokémon 30th anniversary have been released. The Pokémon Company International are pushing a campaign on social media of What's Your Favorite Pokémon? and this starts by using Pokémon GO's photo mode to take a snapshot of you and your favourite Pokémon If you do it, next time you load the game you will get Special Research to get 10,100 Stardust, 5 Rare Candy and 1 Lucky Egg Edit @ 02:02: The Super Bowl trailer supporting this campaign has been released Edit @ 02:08: As part of the celebrations, special events are to be held throughout the year by The Pokémon Company International globally called Pokémon Day Out & Pokémon Night Out Pokémon Day Out events are family friendly activities while Pokémon Night Out events wil have fun surprises for longtime Pokémon fans. Currently dates and locations are not known but we'll provide full details as they come

Pokémon Day Out Logo Pokémon Night Out Logo

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest major Pokémon Sleep event, the Valentine's Day 2026 event is rolling out. This event runs until 03:59 local time on February 16th 2026. This event features boosts to various Pokémon, a focus on Desserts,t he introduction of a new dish the "Honey Gather" Chocolate Waffles, and introduces the Pokémon Cutiefly into the game from 15:00 local time today. We have all details to our Valentine's Day 2026 Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The next Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Online Competition has been announced. This competition is the Grand Challenge 2026 V competition and runs standard Regulation F rules Registration is open from 00:00 UTC on February 12th until February 19th at 23:59 UTC while battles run from 00:00 UTC on February 20th through 23:59 UTC on February 22nd. This competition also gives 10,000 League Points to all players who complete 3 or more battles

In The Games Department Pokémon Café It has been announced that the Pokémon Café in Pokémon Center Tokyo DX in Tokyo will be closed temporarily for refurbishment from March 23rd 2026 through to late June 2026. Currently no further details on the alterations have been confirmed but we'll provide full details as they come.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon TCG Pocket - Bonus Week Missions + Pokémon GO - Catch Mastery
item.description:
07-02-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMT In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Bonus Week Missions The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is a special Bonus Week Event Missions event which has a variety of passive missions to complete to get a variety of rewards including Hourglasses and a new Display Board. We're currently compiling all details in our Bonus Week Missions event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Oricorio Catch Mastery event is now rolling out globally. During this event there will be unique Field Research focused around Oricorio as well free and paid Timed Research to get more encounters with the Oricorio of your region. This event runs from 10:00 to 20:00 local time We have full details in our Catch Mastery: Oricorio event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:
06-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 11:00 GMTEdit @ 05:03: Pokémon HOME Medal | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX & Café ReMix | Edit @ 11:00: Episode Details

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Typhlosion event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Typhlosion appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Ghost Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Typhlosion from raids per save file This event runs until February 12th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME Several new Pokémon HOME medals have been officially revealed. These are medals that will be given at the Pokémon Champions League event in Fukuoka on February 21st & February 22nd. This includes new variants of previously released Mega Charizard X and Mega Dragonite ones, as well as a brand new one featuring Mega Zygarde

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features the Rising Volt Tacklers go to Paldea to convince Clavell to ban Strong Spheres. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Legendary Gauntlet Event The Legendary Gauntlet No. 11 Event has begun its first run. This has you face off against various Legendary Pokémon to build up a win streak. The higher the streak, the better the rewards. It runs until February 19th 2026 Alongside this, a new 5 Star Select Poké Fair Scout is now live that offers the Sync Pairs of Carmine & Sinistcha and Elesa & Tornadus

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Purring Espurr event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Espurr, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until February 11th 2026 We're adding full details to our Purring Espurr event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

This is the Mighty Typhlosion event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Typhlosion appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Ghost Tera Type. item.title: Thursday: Pokémon HOME - PokéPark Medals + Pokémon Sleep - Update + Pokémon Café ReMix - Event Bingo
item.description:
05-02-2026 05:41 GMT / 00:41 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:10 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 06:10: Pokémon Sleep

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME Several new Pokémon HOME medals have been officially revealed. These are special commemorative medals that will be available at Poké Park Kanto starting today. You can redeem them through local GPs and you will get one of the five at random each day In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The Pokémon Sleep update is now live and the maintenance is over. This update adds the data for the coming Valentine's Day event as well as adding the Pokémon Cutiefly into the game, alongside the new "Honey Gather" Chocolate Waffles dish. Our section has been fully updated with all the details.

In The Theme Park Department PokéPark Kanto Today is the opening of PokéPark Kanto in Tokyo, Japan. This park is open year round and provides two experiences; a walk around the Pokémon Forest and the shows and attractions in Sedge Town. This park has a special Pokémon GO event running in conjunction with it, as well as Pokémon HOME Medals and a variety of unique merchandise. We have compiled details of the park in our PokéPark Kanto section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Some new details have been announced for Pokémon GO in the Play! Pokémon circuit. starting with the next season, if your account is tied in to the Pokémon Trainer Central account, you will be able to earn Championship Points by placing in certain places in the GO Battle League Leaderboard in a season. The best finish limit is 4 for this and the points will go towards the Pokémon World Championships. Currently only the next season will have it to earnn points to this year's Pokémon World Championships.

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has begun a short special event to commemorate the opening of the PokéPark Kanto theme park. From today until February 19th, you will be able to participate in the Special Kanto Battle mode in Casual Battles. This mode will only allow for use of Kanto Pokémon Alongside this mode there is a special Event Mission which will give you a PokéPark Kanto sticker for your trainer profile

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Torterra's Stylish Crème Brûlée outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on February 11th 2026 We have full details in our Happy Turtwig event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Friends - Version 1.1.4 Update + Pokémon Masters EX - Next Event
item.description:
04-02-2026 08:00 GMT / 03:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 14:02 GMTEdit @ 08:15: Pokémon Friends | Edit @ 14:20: Pokémon 30

In The Games Department Pokémon 30 Details for the Pokémon 30th anniversary have been released. A special video will be released during the Super Bowl on February 8th 2026 and following that, a year long campaign will be revealed. In addition to this, Pokémon Center will release various Pokémon 30th anniversary merchandise starting today for the Pokémon Center in US, Canada, UK, Australia and New Zealand. More products will release through the year.

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Friends Pokémon Friends has received a brand new update, bringing the game to Version 1.1.4 on both mobile and Nintendo Switch. This update provides a few updates You will now get bonus time when you untangle a puzzle You now have the ability to lower the difficulty of a puzzle by one and play it again from the beginning if it appears too difficult

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next event. This is the next Legendary Gauntlet event which features battles against Tornadus, Terrakion and Raikou in order to obtain points for item rewards. It runs from Friday, February 6th 2026

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Mystery Dungeon - Nintendo Switch Online+ Pokémon Masters EX - Tiny Courage, Big Thanks & Pokémon GO - Carnival of Flamigo
item.description:
03-02-2026 05:16 GMT / 00:16 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:30 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX | Edit @ 06:30: Sales Figures

In The Games Department Pokémon Mystery Dungeon - Nintendo Switch Online Icons The set of new icons have been released for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers for Pokémon Mystery Dungeon Red Rescue Team. These parts can be obtained if you play the game on Nintendo Classics in the next month and can be exchanged by March 3rd 2026 at 00:59 UTC We have added full details to our Nintendo Switch Online section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The "Tiny Courage, Big Thanks" Story Event has begun a repeat run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event focuses on Marley wanting to thank Elesa and Marnie with some gifts. It runs until February 19th 2026 To tie in with that, a new Seasonal Scout is available to get all prior Palentine's Sync Pairs We're currently compiling all details in our Tiny Courage, Big Thanks event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Carnival of Flamigo event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on February 8th. It features Timed Research, both free and paid, which give an encounter with Flamigo as well as two Collection Challenges. This event adds Flamigo into the game We are compiling full details in our Carnival of Flamigo event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Sales Figures Nintendo have released their quarterly financial insights and with this we have new sales data from several Pokémon games as of December 31st 2025 Pokémon Sword & Shield - 27.08 million Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - 28.08 million Pokémon Legends: Z-A - 12.3 million

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Online Icons The second wave of new icons have been released for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. These can be purchased for Platinum Points and used to make your own custom icons. This wave runs for a week until 00:59 UTC on February 9th and includes Mega Meganium, Mega Victreebal, Mega Malamar & Ivor We have added full details to our Nintendo Switch Online section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters For the first time in three years, the Champion Stadium has been updated in Pokémon Masters EX. With this update, the Hard Lv. 1 Mode allows for players to battle against the Paldea Elite Four & Champion. Each battle can be completed once a week with types of Sync Pairs used going towards your medal. Once the medal is achieved by defeating it with Sync Pairs of all 18 types next week, you will be able to challenge them with restrictions to earn points in order to obtain various items

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Emblem Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event, the Fantastical Parade Emblem Event, is the latest Emblem Event which features missions based upon battling other players over the Internet. It provides special Emblems based on your performance. It runs until February 9th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Fantastical Parade Emblem Event event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle + Pokémon GO - Community Day + Pokémon Sleep - Good Sleep Day
item.description:
01-02-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 04:00 GMTEdit @ 04:00: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle Season 39 Pokémon Scarlet & Violet's Ranked Battle Season 39 has begun. This season features a continuation of the Regulation I format. This format allows for you to use two Restricted Pokémon. Alongside this, as Season 38 is now over, the rewards are able to be collected for all players We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 39 section including available Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Community Day The Pokémon GO Community Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Vulpix & Alolan Vulpix will appear, en masse, in Pokémon GO into the game. During this event, when you evolve into Ninetales or Alolan Ninetales, they will know the moves Energy Ball and Chilling Water respectively. This coincides with 3* Catch Experience , 2* Catch Candy, 3 hour Incense and more. This runs at these times: It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Grookey Community Day page

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep Good Sleep Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on February 4th and features bonus Drowsy Power and Pokémon Experience for every Sleep Research that begins during this time period. This will give *1.5 Drowsy Power on February 1st and 3rd and *4 Drowsy Power on February 2nd It also features increased spawns for Cleffa, Clefairy & Clefable We have all details to our Good Sleep Day Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Dynamax Ho-Oh Weekend + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
31-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 16:08 GMTEdit @ 06:24: Pokémon Pokopia | Edit @ 16:08: Pokémon UNITE Championships

In The Games Department Pokémon Pokopia A new pre-order bonus has been confirmed for the US. If you order the game from Amazon in the US and Best Buy in Canada before March 5th 2026, you will receive a code to get a Flat Leaf Plant item to decorate your houses and areas. This follows on from the bonus being available in Amazon in Japan. Currently we have no further details for releases globally but we'll provide details as they come

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Ho-Oh Max Battle Weekend event is now rolling out globally. This event runs from 06:00 to 22:00 local time today and tomorrow and adds Ho-Oh to Max Battles rotating hourly. We have full details in our Dynamax Ho-Oh Weekend event section In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, February 1st 2026, Clodsire's Chic Crepe outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Milk and Berry Jam & Chocolate gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon UNITE Championships Today is the Week 1 Day 1 of the Pokémon UNITE Regional Leagues across North America, Europe and These streams will be running all day starting at 17:00 UTC. We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between UNITE and other streams

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Meganium Raids + Pokémon TCG - Ascended Heroes
item.description:
30-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Meganium event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Meganium appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Psychic Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Meganium from raids per save file This event runs until February 5th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The TCG Department Pokémon Mega Evolution Ascended Heroes - TCG Set Release Today marks the release of the Ascended Heroes TCG Set. This set contains 290 cards of various Pokémon including more Mega Evolution Pokémon from Pokémon Legends: Z-A available as special products which will be released over the next few months Our Ascended Heroes card listing and the associated Cardex have been updated with the full details of all cards in this set

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A: Ranked Battle + Pokémon TCG Pocket - Fantastical Parade
item.description:
29-01-2026 00:03 GMT / 19:03 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMTEdit @ 01:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Legends: Z-A

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 6 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 6 has begun. This season is the sixth for the Z-A Battle Club and features battles to get rewards by earning points in the battle, and allows for use of Mythical Pokémon and adds in Restricted Legendary Pokémon. This season will run until February 19th at 05:59 UTC Players who reach Rank Y to U will get the prior Mega Stones from Ranked Battle while reaching Rank S will give the Swampertite, which adds Mega Swampert into the game. We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 6 section including available Pokémon and rewards

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Secluded Springs The new Pokémon TCG Pocket set, Fantastical Parade is now live in the game and so our coverage of this set is beginning. We're currently compiling full details of all the new additions to the game with this set so be sure to keep checking our section. We have added all the new Emblems and Themed Collections to the sections We have updated the Coins, Playmats, Sleeves, Display Boards & Binders sections with all the new cosmetics available right now

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Pass: February has been announced. This will run from February 3rd 2026 through March 3rd 2026. As before, a free track is available for all players who gain access, or you can purchase to get even more rewards The Pass will include encounters with Pokémon like Giratina, as well as Stardust, candy, Poké Balls, and if you purchase then you'll get PokéCoins, additional encounters and premium items At Rank 25 you will be able to open 40 gifts a day, receive up to 125 gifts a day and hold up to 30 gifts in your bag. If you get the Deluxe pass, you will be able to open 50 a day, receive up to 150 a day from PokéStops and Gyms and hold up to 40 in your bag At Rank 50 you will get 2* Daily Adventure Incense duration At Rank 75 you will get two raid Passes a day

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon TCG Pocket - Update + Pokémon Sleep - Valentine's Event + Pokémon Masters EX
item.description:
28-01-2026 02:28 GMT / 21:28 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 04:00 GMTEdit @ 04:00: Pokémon Masters EX

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket A new update is live for Pokémon TCG Pocket. This update contains the details for the new trade messaging and random match system as well as various other fixes Alongside this, the cards for the new set Fantastical Parade are also available and we're adding them into our database

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The next Pokémon Sleep event has been revealed. This is the Valentine's Day 2026 event and runs from February 9th at 04:00 local time through February 16th at 03:59 local time, adding Cutiefly and Ribombee into the game. During the event, all dishes will be Desserts and you have an increased Shiny chance Final strength of dishes ill be multiplied by *1.5 and ingredients gathered from main skills will be increased by *1.25 Cutiefly, and Ribombee, Bulbasaur, Pinsir, Ditto, Wooper (Paldean Form), Mawile, Absol, Croagunk, Stufful, Comfey, and Cramorant will spawn more A new dish will be available with this event Cutiefly & Ribombee are Fairy-type Pokémon with the Snoozing Sleep Style

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next event. This event is the Palentine's event and adds Adaman & Shiny Sylveon and Rika & Shiny Quagsire into the game. Runs from January 30th 202

Footage

In The Anime Department Pokémon Rising Again A new episode title has been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. This episode is due to air on February 6th 2026. Episode 126: A Battle We Can't Afford to Lose! Bonds Get Put to the Test!!

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon GO - PokéPark Kanto + Into the Depths
item.description:
27-01-2026 05:09 GMT / 00:09 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 07:00 GMTEdit @ 07:00: Pokémon UNITW

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Pokémon GO has detailed the special event gameplay that will run alongside PokéPark Kanto alongside its release next week on February 5th At the park, Bulbasaur, Charmander, Squirtle, Rattata, Pidgey, Pikachu, Eevee, Unown P and Unown K will spawn There will be Field Research to get encounters with Pokémon that can be found as statues throughout the park Raids will rotate every four months: Zapdos from February through May, Moltres from June through September and Articuno from October through January. When captured, they will have a special PokéPark Kanto Location Background In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Into the Depths event which runs from 10:00 local time today through 20:00 local time on February 1st and adds Glimmet into the game, available through Routes and Timed Research We are compiling full details in our Into the Depths event section

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a new patch in order to alter a variety of Pokémon with various adjustments to a variety of Pokémon including Meowth as well as the resumption of draft pick. We've begun compiling all the changes of this patch in our Patch section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Masters EX - A Pure & Touching Heart + Pokémon Café ReMix - Keep Rolling, Electrode
item.description:
26-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 07:02 GMTEdit @ 06:34: Nintendo Switch Online | Edit @ 07:02: PokéLid

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Online Icons New icons have been released for Nintendo Switch Online subscribers for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. These can be purchased for Platinum Points and used to make your own custom icons. This wave runs a week and includes Mega Charizard X, Mega Charizard Y, Mega Raichu X, Mega Raichu Y, Mega Dragonite, Mega Eelektross, the player characters, Canari, Tarragon and AZ We have added full details to our Nintendo Switch Online section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Timed Research has gone live for the Pokémon GO Dynamax Ho-Oh Max Battle Weekend event. This Timed Research is designed to help players prepare for the event with a focus on Dynamax Kabuto. It is available from 06:00 local time until the end of the event on February 1st at 21:00 local time We have added full details into our Dynamax Ho-Oh Max Battle Weekend section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The "A Pure & Touching Heart" Story Event has begun a repeat run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event focuses on the story of Nate being inducted into the Neo Champions on Pasio. It runs until February 9th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our A Pure & Touching Heart event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Keep Rolling, Electrode event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Electrode, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until February 1st 2026 We're adding full details to our Keep Rolling, Electrode event page

In The Pokémon Department Poké Lids A new PokéLid has been officially revealed. THis PokéLid is located within PokéPark Kanto in Tokyo and features a design of the PokéPark outfits of Pikachu and Eevee. It is also available as a Pokémon HOME medal

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon Masters EX - Pokémon Masters Day + Pokémon Café ReMix - Event Bingo + Pokémon Regional Championships
item.description:
25-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX The monthly special event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. For one day only each month on the 25th, the Pokémon Masters Day event will be held. This event will give you a variety of rewards for completion. A sync Grid Expansion has happened for Darach & Staraptor and Serena & Greninja. A Triple Feature Masters EX Scout is also available to get Nate & Shiny Haxorus, Archie & Kyogre and Serena & Greninja We've updated our Pokémon Masters Day page with the details of this month's event.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Electrode's Stylish Crème Brûlée outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on February 1st 2026 We have full details in our Elegant Vivillon event page

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 2 of the Pokémon Birmingham Regional Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 09:00 (UTC) / 04:00 (EST) / 01:00 (PST) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 11:30 (UTC) / 06:30 (EST) / 03:30 (PST) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 08:35 (UTC) / 03:35 (EST) / 00:35 (PST) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-fourth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Sinnoh Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the fourth generation. Screaming a bloodcurdling battle cry, this huge and ferocious bird Pokémon goes out on the hunt. It blasts lakes with shock waves, then scoops up any prey that float to the water's surface. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-fourth Pokémon, Palkia

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Shadow Raikou Raid Day
item.description:
24-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Raid Day The newest Raid Day is rolling out in Pokémon GO. For three hours in each region, Shadow Raikou will appear in Raids on each Gym in the area With this, you will get up to 5 extra Raid Passes from Gyms and can participate in up to 20 Remote Raid a day. You will also have a higher chance of finding shiny Raikou after completion of the raid. A paid ticket is also available that gives increased experience as well as another 8 additional free Raid Passes from Gyms. It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Shadow Raikou Raid Day page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Blastoise Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon Rising Again - Episode Details + Pokémon GO - Precious Pals: Taken Over + Project Voltage + Pokémon UNITE
item.description:
23-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:01 GMTEdit @ 05:08: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 06:25: Pokémon Sleep | Edit @ 09:13: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 09;45: Project Voltage | Edit @ 10:14: Character Biography | Edit @ 10:39: Episode Details | Edit @ 13:01: Pokémon UNITE Battle Pass

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Blastoise event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Blastoise appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Steel Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Blastoise from raids per save file This event runs until January 29th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features the Rising Volt Tacklers and Amethio storm Explorers HQ to find the Six Heroes. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons - Character Biography With the latest episode that aired in Japan, we have been able to update Liko biography with a Pokémon that she obtained in this episode. Be warned as the biography contains spoilers

In The Music Department Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku: Project Voltage High It has been confirmed that the next Pokémon feat. Hatsune Miku: Project Voltage High song will be released on Wednesday January 28th at 09:39 UTC. This song is one of three announced songs to be coming before the concert in Tokyo Bay in March 2026. We'll provide full details on the song as it comes

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE One new piece of Holowear has been released for Pokémon UNITE. This is the Neo Street Style Holowear for Darkrai which is obtained by through a spceial event Treasure Chest. This Holowear is a new rarity of Holowear which includes animations for Moves, movement, Unite Moves and more.

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has announced the next Battle Pass. This Battle Pass will go live on January 30th 2026 and will add one new pieces of Holowear: Fairy-tale Style Galarian Rapidash among various other items

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep Pokémon Sleep has announced a special gift is being given to celebrate the game's 2.5 Year anniversary. From now until April 8th at 05:00 UTC, all playrs who log in get 1,000 sleep Points, 5 Poké Biscuit, 2 Friend Incense and 10 Handy Candy S.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO A new Pokémon GO Stamp Rally has been announced. In Cologne, Germany on February 7th at 12pm through 4pm, there will be a Stamp Rally that features 5 stamps that, when you complete it, gets you a Flamigo with the Cologne Location Background. The stamps are at Ottoplatz, Rhine Boulevard, Roncalliplatz, Marian Column, MediaPark There will also be free Timed Research in Cologne from February 3rd through February 8th which also gives a Flamigo with the location background. It also gives the bonus of 2* Lure Module duration and 2* Transfer Candy

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Precious Pals: Taken Over event which runs from 00:00 local time through 20:00 local time on January 25th and adds Shadow Thundurus as well as Shadow Chespin, Shadow Fennekin and Shadow Froakie into the game We have comiled full details in our Precious Pals: Taken Over event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

23-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Blastoise from raids per save file This event runs until January 29th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

This event is the Precious Pals: Taken Over event which runs from 00:00 local time through 20:00 local time on January 25th and adds Shadow Thundurus as well as Shadow Chespin, Shadow Fennekin and Shadow Froakie into the game We have comiled full details in our Precious Pals: Taken Over event section

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle & Update + Pokémon x Universal Studios Announcement
item.description:
22-01-2026 01:33 GMT / 20:33 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 15:09 GMTEdit @ 05:03: Ranked Battle | Edit @ 05:15: Universal Studios | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 10:00: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 14:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 15:09: Episode Title

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 6 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 6 has been announced. This season will run from January 29th at 06:00 UTC to February 19th at 01:59 UTC. It also allows for use of Lumiose Pokédex #001-232 and Hyperspace Pokédex #001 - 132, allowing one Restircted Legendary Pokémon on your team Players will be able to get the Greninjite at Rank Y, the Delphoxite at Rank X, Chesnaughtite at Rank W, Baxcalibrite at Rank V, Sceptilite at Rank U and Swampertite at Rank S, adding Mega Swampert into the game

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket The latest set for Pokémon TCG Pocket has been officially revealed. This set is called Fantastical Parade and will release on January 29th 2026 and focuses on Mega Gardevoir and Ogerpon and introduces Stadium cards into the game We have begun adding all details into our Fantastical Parade section The next events have also been announced Elite Deck Gift Missions runs from January 30th to April 27th and offers missions to get a Fire-type Elite Deck focused on Mega Blaziken ex and Entei ex

Handy Card Collection Missions runs from January 30th to April 27th and offers missions to get cards with useful effects The Mega Medicham ex Drop Event runs from February 12th to February 22nd The Wonder Pick event featuring Cinderance and Alolan Vulpix, with cosmetics themed on Toxtricity, runs on February 15th to February 25th

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A A new patch is live for Pokémon Legends: Z-A. This patch brings the game up to Version 2.0.1 and features a variety of small bug fixes. The update is required to go online. This update includes several updates and bug fixes At Berry Stalls, it allows you to buy multiple of a Berry at once Adds a new Berry Shop to Nouveau Café No. 3 Increases the amount of Mega Shards holdable from 999 to 9999 It also includes the following bug fixes In Hyperspace Lumiose, it fixes an issue where the Pokémon will move in a direction other than target Fixes an issue where the weather may not change Fixes an issue where the Shiny version of a Mega Evolved Pokémon caught before getting Mega Dimension won't display in the Mega Evolution Pokédex Fixes an issue where an image from an unrelated scene may display during a mission Fixes an issue where Side Mission 188 can't be cleared if you have too many Survey Points

In The Theme Parks Department Pokémon x Universal Studios Japan It has been announced that a new Pokémon experience is coming to Universal Studios Japan as a global rollout project. This will build ultra realistic experiences to bring the Pokémon world to life in the theme park. It will be available at other Universal Studios including Orlando, Florida as well after its debut in Universal Studios Japan. Currently no further details have been announced but we'll provide more details as they come

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE It has been confirmed that Sirfetch'd is to be available in Pokémon UNITE on January 30th 2026. Currently we don't have full details for them such as moves or stats but we'll provide full details as soon as they come

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Precious Pals event which runs from 00:00 local time on January 23rd through 20:00 local time on January 25th and adds Shadow Thundurus into the game We are compiling full details in our Precious Pals: Taken Over event section In The Anime Department Pokémon Rising Again A new episode title has been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. This episode is due to air on January 30th 2026. Episode 125: Get Back the Six Heroes!

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a new patch in order to alter a variety of Pokémon with various adjustments to a variety of Pokémon including Inteleon, Decidueye, Vaporeon and more. We've begun compiling all the changes of this patch in our Patch section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Café ReMix - Elegant Vivillon + Pokémon Masters EX - Super Sparring
item.description:
21-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMT

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Europe International Championships - The Pokémon Company International has opened up Registration for the Pokémon Center at the European International Championships, running from February 12th through February 15th. Without a reservation, you will be unable to get into the Pokémon Center.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Elegant Vivillon event and adds Vivillon (Elegant Pattern) into the game. This event is a Full Bellied Adventure event where you go through one minute cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until February 1st Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Tatsugiri (Good Fortune) We have begun compiling all details in our Elegant Vivillon event section In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Ranked Damage Event The seventeenth Pokémon Masters EX Ranked Damage Event is now live. This event, Super Sparring, has you face off against one of three battles in order to earn points by inflicting high amounts of damage on the opponent. This runs until January 29th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Super Sparring event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon Europe International Championships - Distributions +Pokémon GO - Precious Pals
item.description:
20-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMT

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Europe International Championships - The Pokémon Company International has revealed a variety of details for EUIC, specifically the digital distirbutions obtained while watching the stream. Pokémon Scarlet & Violet players will recieve a code to get a Hisuian Typhlosion based on the Hisuian Typhlosion used by Yuma Kinugawa to win the 2026 Latin America International Championships. It has the moves Eruption, Shadow Ball, Heat Wave, and Overheat Pokémon TCG Live will give some Special Illustration Rarr cards of N's Zoroark ex and Marnie's Grimmsnarl ex through code in the live stream. There will also be Mega Charizard X themed cosmetics and jacketin-game via Twitch Drops Pokémon GO players will receive a code through Twitch Drops for Timed Research to get a Dewgong that knows Icy Wind Pokémon UNITE players will eceive a code to get an EUIC sticker and Twitch Drops will offer a Charizard boost emblem

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon Europe International Championships - The Pokémon Company International has revealed the Programming Schedule for the Europe International Championships. There will be various panels and meet & greets with TCG Artists, Notable Trainers and more. There will also be live music on the Programming Stage. You can sign up for Interest Lists on the Interest List page. You need to register interest by 23:59 UTC on February 3rd and will be notified if you were successful by February 9th at 23:59 UTC Meet & Greets - Requires Interest List Friday: Asako Ito, matazo, PokegirlRach, Serebii, Zero of Time Saturday: Yuya Oka, Scav, Duragdragon, Richard Fairlie, and ben.m0v, JamieJoArt, Kantochlo and Ginamon Sunday: TCG casters, VGC Casters, Newtiteuf, MissJirachi and Pinku Kiwi, UNITE Casters, GO Casters Programming Schedule Friday Schedule 09:30-10:30: Meet & Greet with Pokémon 11:00-12:00: Pokémon 2.B.A. Master Album LIVE! 12:30-13:30: Meet and Greet with Pokémon  14:00-15:00: Pokémon Gaming Gauntlet 15:30-16:30: Cosplay Showcase 17:00-18:00: Meet and Greet with Pokémon Saturday Schedule 09:30-10:30: Meet & Greet with Pokémon 11:00-12:00: A Selection of Music from Pokémon Red Version and Pokémon Green Version LIVE! 12:30-13:30: Meet and Greet with Pokémon  14:00-15:00: TCG Artist Spotlight Panel Featuring Asako Ito and matazo 15:30-16:30: Pokémon Battle Bracket Bonanza! 17:00-18:00: Meet and Greet with Pokémon Sunday Schedule 09:30-10:30: Meet & Greet with Pokémon 11:00-12:00: TCG Artist Spotlight ft. Yuya Oka and Scav 12:30-13:30: Meet and Greet with Pokémon  14:00-15:00: Pokemon Gaming Gauntlet 15:30-16:30: Meet and Greet with Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Precious Pals event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on January 25th and features Collection Challenges and paid Timed Research alongside a big boost to the amount of hearts you can earn with your buddy each day. It also adds Shiny Fidough & Dachsbun into the game We are compiling full details in our Precious Pals event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon GO - Ho-Oh Dynamax Battle Weekend & Precious Pals + Pokémon Sleep - Super Skill Week Part 3
item.description:
19-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 21:00 GMTEdit @ 18:00: Pokémon GO

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO Max Battle Weekend has been announced. On January 31st & February 1st, Dynamax Ho-Oh will be in Max Battles. During the event you can get up to 1600 Max Particles a day, 25% distance to get Max particles and you get 8 Max Particles from Power Spots. There will be Timed Research from January 26th you will get free Timed Research which gives a Dynamax Kabuto and rewards to prepare There will also be an event ticket to purchase that gets Timed Research to get 6400 Max Particles & 25,000 Experience, as well as the bonus of 2* Experience from Max Battles and more Candy & Candy XL rewards

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Precious Pals event which runs from 10:00 local time on January 20th through 20:00 local time on January 25th and adds Shiny Fidough & Dachsbun into the game We are compiling full details in our Precious Pals event section

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Community Day dates, as well as dates for other events, have been officially revealed. The Community Day events will be held on: Saturday, March 14 2026 Saturday, April 11 2026 Saturday, May 9 2026 Saturday, May 16 2026 (Community Day Classic) In addition to that, the following events will be held during the next season

Saturday through Monday, March 79 2026 (Season event) Saturday, March 21 2026 (Research Day) Saturday, March 28 2026 (Max Battle Day) Saturday, April 4 2026 (Raid Day) Saturday, April 18 2026 (Hatch Day) Saturday, April 25 2026 (Max Battle Day) Saturday, May 2 2026 (Shadow Raid Day) Saturday, May 23 2026 (Raid Day)

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest major Pokémon Sleep event, the Super Skill Week Part 3 event is rolling out. This event runs until 03:59 local time on January 26th 2026. This event features boosts to various Pokémon with the Skills speciality and introduces the Pokémon Shuckle into the game from 15:00 local time today. We have all details to our Super Skill Week Part 3 Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon GO - Community Day + Pokémon Sleep - New Moon Day + Pokémon of the Week
item.description:
18-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Community Day The Pokémon GO Community Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Grookey will appear, en masse, in Pokémon GO and adding its Shiny into the game. During this event, when you evolve into Rillaboom, it will know the move Frenzy Plant, which is exclusive to this event, alongside the introduction of Drum Beating. This coincides with 3* Catch Starduust , 2* Catch Candy, 3 hour Incense and more. This runs at these times: It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Grookey Community Day page

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep New Moon Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on January 21st 2026 and features a special boost where Pokémon will not become hungry straight away and has an increased Shiny chance. It also features increased spawns for Darkrai We have all details to our New Moon Day Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The third and final bingo reward panel is now live for the Dedenne's Splendid Mochi event in Pokémon Café ReMix. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Ludicolo Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on January 21st 2026 We have full details in our Dedenne's Splendid Mochi event page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until January 21st at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Regional Championships Today is Day 2 of the Pokémon Toronto Regional Championships. Today features battles for three of the games in the current Play! Pokémon Circuit: TCG, GO and Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. All three games will be streamed in individual streams The Pokémon VG Stream begins at 14:15 (UTC) / 09:15 (EST) / 06:15 (PST) The Pokémon TCG Stream begins at 15:30 (UTC) / 10:30 (EST) / 07:30 (PST) The Pokémon GO Stream begins at 14:45 (UTC) / 09:45 (EST) / 06:45 (PST) We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between all streams or loading all together

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon UNITE Championships Today is the Week 1 Day 2 of the Pokémon UNITE Regional Leagues across North America, Europe and These streams will be running all day starting at 17:00 UTC. We have all the streams in our Play! Pokémon Stream Hub which allows for tabbing between UNITE and other streams

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-third entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Unova & Hisui Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the fifth generation. Screaming a bloodcurdling battle cry, this huge and ferocious bird Pokémon goes out on the hunt. It blasts lakes with shock waves, then scoops up any prey that float to the water's surface. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-third Pokémon, Braviary

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon TCG - Nihil Zero + Pokémon Masters EX - Academy Event
item.description:
16-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMTEdit @ 05:16: Pokémon TCG | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Charizard event and is the latest in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Charizard appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Dragon Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Charizard from raids per save file This event runs until January 23rd 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game The Pokémon Company have revealed the full main set for the coming Pokémon TCG set in Japan, Nihil Zero. This set contains 80 cards featuring Mega Evolutions introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A including Mega Clefable We have begun cataloguing all the known cards in our Nihil Zero set page with translations thanks to ToineLay

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Academy Event The "Art Agony, Teacher's Tears" Academy Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is the latest Academy Event where you get given a Sync Pair, in this case Kris (Academy) & Igglybuff, and have to battle through stages to earn Orbs in order to power them up. It runs until February 2nd To tie in with that, a new EX Fair Scout is available to get the Sync Pair of Brassius & Sudowoodo (Tera: Grass). A second EX Fair Scout is also live to get Hassel & Baxcalibur. We're currently compiling all details in our Art Agony, Teacher's Tears event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Rumba de Ludicolo event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Ludicolo, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until January 21st 2026 We're adding full details to our Rumba de Ludicolo event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:
15-01-2026 03:00 GMT / 22:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 09:02 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 09:02: Pokémon Sleep

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Deluxe Pack ex Pokémon TCG Pocket has brought back the Deluxe Pack ex set. This set features over 300 cards including reprints of cards from the A Seris and Parallel Foil versions of them, as well as Illustration cards unique to the set. This set will be available again until January 29th 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The Pokémon Sleep update is now live and the maintenance is over. This update adds the data for the coming Super Skill Week Part 3 event as well as adding the Pokémon Shuckle into the game. This update also adds the ability to view New Sleep Styles automatically in Speed Review and adds the Berry Juice item.

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next event. This event is the Art Agony, Teacher's Tears Academy event and adds Kris & Igglybuff, Hassel & Baxcalibur and Brassius & Sudowoodo into the game. It runs from January 16th 2026

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has released its new update. In this update, the new Casual Battle Mode, Super Magikarp Splash is now available, which lets you battle solely with Gyarados and Mega Gyarados. Special event missions are now live that offer Gold Emblems for completion One new piece of Holowear is also now live in the Treasure Chest Challenge. This is the Oasis Style for Inteleon. It has full animations for everything

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Pikachu's Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on January 21st 2026 We have full details in our Dedenne's Splendid Mochi event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.description:
14-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 21:00 GMT Edit @ 18:00: Pokémon GO | Edit @ 21:00: Pokémon GO Raid Day

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the Precious Pals: Taken Over event and is due to run January 23rd at 00:00 to January 25th at 20:00 local time and adds Shadow Thundurus into the game Team GO Rocket will appear more in PokéStops and Balloons during the event and you can use a Charged TM to have Shadow Pokémon forget Frustration Team GO Rocket will also use Shadow Chespin, Shadow Fennekin and Shadow Froakie There will be Field Research to get Fast TMs, Charged TMs and Mysterious Components A Collection Challenge will be available to get Experience, Stardust and a Rocket Radar

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO Raid Day has been announced. It will run on January 24th 2026 from 14:00 to 17:00 local time, focused on the Pokémon Shadow Raikou Players will get up to 5 more additional Raid Passes from PokéStops and an Event ticket will be live for 8 more Raid Passes, 50% more experience, 2* more Stardust and more Rare Candy XL

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has announced a new update coming to the game tomorrow. This update will release tomorrow, January 15th 2026 In this update, you'll be able to re-unite with a team you just battled with immediately on the results screen. You will also be able to praise teammates in Quick Chat on the lobby screen A new Quick Battle mode will be added from January 15th through 28th: Super Magikarp Splash. This mode will allow for you to only use Gyarados and Mega Gyarados Unite Licenses and will have missions to get Gold Emblems.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun a brand new Special Pass. This Pass can be purchased in the shop and allows for you to earn points to obtain various items including Tarts and Golden Acorns, as well as obtain Magikarp

Until Next Time, See Ya

This event focuses on Electric-type Pokémon and adds Shiny Tadbulb into the game. It also has a Global Challenge which will unlock Wattrel & Kilowattrel in the wild when completed We are compiling full details in our High Zaptitude event section

item.title: Monday: LEGO Pokémon Reveal + Pokémon GO - High Zaptitude
item.description:
12-01-2026 14:00 GMT / 09:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 20:00 GMTEdit @ 20:00: Pokémon GO

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon x LEGO The Pokémon Company and LEGO have announced the first ever LEGO Pokémon sets. These sets are due to be released on February 27th 2026 The Eevee set is 587 pieces and will cost $59.99 The Pikachu & Poké Ball set is 2050 pieces and will cost $199.99 The Venusaur, Charizard & Blastoise set is 6838 pieces and will cost $649.99 A special Gift With Purchase of the Kanto Region Badge Collection, a 312 piece set, will be available in the LEGO store and online as well as on the Pokémon Center website when you purchase the Venusaur, Charizard & Blastoise set. A LEGO Insiders bonus of a Mini Pokémon Center has also been announced. It is 233 pieces and will be available for 2,500 Insider Points on February 27th We'll provide full details as and when they're released on these sets and more so be sure to keep checking back Edit: We have created a full LEGO Pokémon section with details on every one of the sets.

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the High Zaptitude event which runs from 10:00 local time on January 13th through 20:00 local time on January 18th and adds Wattrel & Kilowattrel into the game via completion of a Global Challenge We are compiling full details in our High Zaptitude event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

The Eevee set is 587 pieces and will cost $59.99 The Pikachu & Poké Ball set is 2050 pieces and will cost $199.99 The Kanto First Partner Pokémon set is 6838 pieces and will cost $649.99 A special Gift With Purchase of the Kanto Region Badge Collection, a 312 piece set, will be available in the LEGO store and online as well as on the Pokémon Center website A LEGO Insiders bonus of a Mini Pokémon Center has also been announced. item.title: Sunday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A + Pokémon Café ReMix - Dedenne's Splendid Mochi
item.description:
11-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week | Edit @ 15:08: Nintendo Switch Online

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Nintendo Switch Online Icons The icons for the special Nintendo Switch Online mission for Pokémon Legends: Z-A are now mostly given out on a gradual rollout. If you played Pokémon Legends: Z-A from December 10th through January 5th 01:00 UTC and cleared the mission in the NSO app, you will have the icons for Mega Chesnaught, Mega Delphox and Mega Greninja in your inventory We have full details in our Nintendo Switch Online section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Dedenne's Splendid Mochi event and adds Dedenne's Splendid Mochi outfit into the game. This event is a Café Pop-up event where you go through slow cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until January 21st 2026 and features the New Year Lucky Wheel to get various rewards Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Victini (Festive Ceremony) We have begun compiling all details in our Dedenne's Splendid Mochi event section In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-third entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Kitakami Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the ninth generation. The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom. Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-third Pokémon, Munkidori

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon GO - Kyurem Fusion Raid Day
item.description:
10-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 00:00 GMT

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Raid Day The newest Raid Day is rolling out in Pokémon GO. For three hours in each region, Reshiram, Zekrom, Black Kyurem and White Kyurem will appear in Raids on each Gym in the area, rotating every 30 minutes. With this, you will get up to 5 extra Raid Passes from Gyms and can participate in up to 20 Remote Raid a day. You will also have a higher chance of finding shiny Metagross after completion of the raid. A paid ticket is also available that gives increased experience as well as another 8 additional free Raid Passes from Gyms. It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Kyurem Fusion Raid Day page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Venusaur Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon TCG - Nihil Zero + Pokémon TCG Pocket - Wonder Pick Event
item.description:
09-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 11:00 GMTEdit @ 05:10: Pokémon TCG | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 11:00: Episode Details

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the Mighty Venusaur event and is the first in the series of weekly Starter Pokémon Tera Raid Battle reruns. This event has Venusaur appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Ground Tera Type. As with all past 7 Star Raid events, players can only catch one Venusaur from raids per save file This event runs until January 15th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game The Pokémon Company have revealed more cards for the next Japanese Pokémon TCG set, Nihil Zero, ahead of its release in two weeks. This update contains a variety of cards including the first Mega Starmie card We have begun cataloguing all the known cards in our Nihil Zero set page with translations thanks to ToineLay

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features the Rising Volt Tacklers starting to do a mysterious dance while waiting for Diana. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Wonder Pick Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Wonder Pick event which features a special Wonder Pick featuring new Heliolisk & Buneary Promo cards, as well as various missions to earn Shop Tickets to exchange for new cosmetic items themed around Goomy. It runs until January 19th 2026. We're currently compiling all details in our Wonder Pick Event event section

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a update which adds a variety of things to the game. First, the Pokémon Meowth is now available to obtain as a new unique Unite License. Alongside this, its new Happi Style Holowear is also available We're currently compiling full details for Meowth in our Pokémon section for the game.

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Battles for next Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Online Competition have begun. This competition is the Grand Challenge 2026 IV competition and runs standard Regulation F rules. Battles run from 00:00 UTC on January 9th to 23:59 UTC on January 11th. This competition also gives 10,000 League Points to all players who complete 3 or more battles Players enrolled in the Pokémon Championship Series can earn Championship Points for ranking.

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - High Score Event A new High Score event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. This event is the Ghost & Fairy Conqueror event which features battles against Ghost & Fairy Sync Pairs with the aim to earn the most points to get rewards. It runs until January 18th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Ghost & Fairy Conqueror event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Dedenne's Splendid Mochi and adds Dedenne's Splendid Mochi outfit into the game. It will run from 06:00 UTC on January 11th 2026. We'll provide full details of this event and Dedenne as the event goes live so be sure to check back.

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket Ranked Match season, Season B1a is now live. This is the ninth Ranked Match season where you work up the ranks by winning in battles against random players online. After the season ends, you will get Emblems based on your position. This season runs until January 26th 2026 We have full details of the Ranked Match season, including points required for each rank in our Season B1a section.

Until Next Time, See Ya
