item.description:
08-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 15:55 GMTEdit @ 14:01: Pokémon TCG | Edit @ 15:55: Episode Title

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 5 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 4 has begun. This season is the fifth for the Z-A Battle Club and features battles to get rewards by earning points in the battle, and allows for use of Mythical Pokémon and certain Legendary Pokémon. This season will run until January 29th at 05:59 UTC Players who reach Rank Y to V will get the prior Mega Stones from Ranked Battle while reaching Rank S will give the Sceptilite, which adds Mega Sceptile into the game. We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 5 section including available Pokémon and rewards

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game - Perfect Order The Pokémon Company International have also officially revealed the next set, Perfect Order. This set will be released in March 27th 2026 and features a variety of Pokémon and mega Evolutions introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A including Mega Zygarde, Mega Clefable and Mega Starmie. This set features 4 Mega Evolution Pokémon-ex, 9 Pokémon-ex, 11 Illustration Rare Pokémon, 18 Ultra Rare Pokémon & Trainer cards, 6 Special Illustration Rare Pokémon and Trainer cards We have added all revealed cards to our Perfect Order page

In The Anime Department Pokémon Rising Again A new episode title has been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. This episode is due to air on January 23rd 2026. Episode 124: Storming Explorers Headquarters!

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The third and final bingo reward panel is now live for the New Year's With Keldeo event in Pokémon Café ReMix. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Keldeo's Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on January 11th 2026 We have full details in our New Year's With Keldeo event page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until January 11th at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon Sleep - New Event + Pokémon Masters EX - Move Candy Challenge
item.description:
07-01-2026 04:11 GMT / 23:11 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX

In The Museum Department Pokémon x Natural History Museum Further details have been revealed for the Pokémon x Natural History Museum. It has been confirmed that this collaboration is themed around the Pokécology book with merchandise that matches. The merchandise will be available in the shop and then a select selection will be available from the Natural History Musejm's website at 12pm on Monday January 26th. Some of the lines will also be available on the Pokémon Center website. Alongside that, a Jumbo promo card will be given to all people who make a purchase at the special pop-up. Alongside this, the card will be available for people in the UK at various retailers from January 30th Pokémon x Natural History Museum Pikachu Card

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The next Pokémon Sleep event has been revealed. This is the Super Skill Week Part 3 and runs from January 19th at 04:00 local time through January 26th at 03:59 local time. This event adds Shuckle into the game During this event, the chance of Pokémon with the Skills specialty having their skills activate will be increaased by 50% and their Main Skil level will be increased by 3 The Mini Candy Boost option will also be available during this event Meowth, Psyduck, Growlithe, Slowpoke, Magnemite, Eevee, Igglybuff, Togepi, Mareep, Murkrow, Heracross, Treecko, Ralts, Sableye, Plusle, Minun, Gulpin, Wynaut, Drifloon, Bonsly, Riolu, Dwebble, Rufflet, Dedenne, Togedemaru, Mimikyu, Toxel, and Pawmi will spawn more Shuckle is a Dozing Bug-type Pokémon that appears in Greengrass Isle, Cyan Beach, Taupe Hollow, Amber Canyon and Greengrass Isle (Expert). It has the new Skill Berry Juice (Energy for Everyone S) which restores energy to all helper Pokémon but may give you a Berry Juice item. You can hold up to 5 Berry Juice in your bag and the Berry Juice restores 20 Energy to 1 Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The "Move Candy Challenge" Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event features a Daily Battle to complete missions to earn rewards culminating in a Move Candy reward. It runs until January 25th 2026. We're currently compiling all details in our Move Candy Challenge event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Tuesday: Pokémon GO - Pinch Perfect + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
06-01-2026 06:00 GMT / 101:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 08:00 GMTEdit @ 08:00: Pokémon Horizons: Rising Hope

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the Pinch Perfect Event event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on January 11th and adds Klawf and Shiny Dhelmise into the game, with new Timed Research every two day focusing on one of the other focal Pokémon We are compiling full details in our Pinch Perfect Event event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Shaymin and the Floral Scent event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Shaymin (Sky Forme), offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until January 11th 2026 We're adding full details to our Shaymin and the Floral Scent event page

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons - News The first batch of episodes for Pokémon Horizons Season 3: Rising Hope are now available to watch on Netflix in the US and other countries. These episodes continue the story of Pokémon Horizons 1 year on from the finale of Season 2 and feature Liko, Dot and Roy hoping to rebuild the Rising Volt Tacklers after Laquium is seen returning

In The Music Department Pokémon Horizons Season 3: Rising Hope - Evolving Again The main theme song to the dub series of Pokémon Horizons Season 3: Rising Hope, Evolving Again, is now available to purchase and stream on all music platforms including Apple Music, Amazon Music, Google Music, Spotify and more. This song is an extended version of the one that airs with every episode of the anime which is currently airing globally

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Monday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Tera Raid Battle Event & Ranked Battle + Pokémon Sleep - New Year's Event Week 2
item.description:
05-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 04:00 GMTEdit @ 04:00: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Ranked Battle

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The next 7 Star Tera Raid Battle event has been announced for Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This event features a seires of the First Partner Pokémon from various regions coming back into 7 Star Raids. The events will run weekly starting January 9th 2026 with the Ground Tera Type Venusaur. This will run until January 15th 2026 at 23:59 UTC and the next one will start immediately afterwards. If you previously caught them when they first ran, you will be unable to catch them again We'll provide full details on each one as they come so be sure to keep checking back

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Ranked Battle Season 38 Pokémon Scarlet & Violet's Ranked Battle Season 38 has begun. This season features a return to the Regulation I format. This format allows for you to use two Restricted Pokémon. Alongside this, as Season 37 is now over, the rewards are able to be collected for all players We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 38 section including available Pokémon

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The Pokémon Sleep New Year's 2026 event has gone into its second week. This week features different spawns happening in all islands as well as new missions to obtain Dream Coins. We have all details to our New Years 2026 Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon GO - Community Day Classic + Pokémon TCG Pocket - Bonus Week Missions
item.description:
04-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket | Edit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Community Day The Pokémon GO Community Day Classic is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, Piplup will appear, en masse, in Pokémon GO. During this event, when you evolve Prinplup & Empoleon, it will learn the Charge Move, Hydro Cannon, which is exclusive to this event. This coincides with 25% Egg Incubator Distance, 3 hour Incense and more. This runs at these times: It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details on our Piplup Community Day Classic page In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Bonus Week Missions The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is a special Bonus Week Event Missions event which has a variety of passive missions to complete to get a variety of rewards including Hourglasses and a new Display Board. We're currently compiling all details in our Bonus Week Missions event section

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-second entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Johto Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the second generation. Its feathers are in seven colors. It is said that anyone seeing it is promised eternal happiness. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-second Pokémon, Ho-Oh

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon UNITE - Holowear + Pokémon Sleep - Good Sleep Day
item.description:
02-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 05:47 GMTEdit @ 05:47: Pokémon UNITE

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE One new piece of Holowear has been released for Pokémon UNITE. This is the Steampunk Style Holowear for Ho-Oh which is obtained by through a spceial event Treasure Chest. This Holowear is a new rarity of Holowear which includes animations for Moves, movement, Unite Moves and more.

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep Good Sleep Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on January 5th and features bonus Drowsy Power and Pokémon Experience for every Sleep Research that begins during this time period. This will give *1.5 Drowsy Power on January 2nd and 4th and *2 Drowsy Power on January 3rd It also features increased spawns for Cleffa, Clefairy & Clefable We have all details to our Good Sleep Day Event Page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A Ranked Battle + Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Online Competitions + Pokémon TCG Pocket - Monthly Subscription + Pokémon Masters EX + Pokémon Café ReMix
item.description:
01-01-2026 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMTEdit @ 05:07: Pokémon Legends: Z-A | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX & Pokémon TCG Pocket & Pokémon Café ReMix

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 5 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 5 has been announced. This season will run from January 8th at 06:00 UTC to January 29th at 01:59 UTC. It also allows for use of Lumiose Pokédex #001-227 and Hyperspace Pokédex #001 - 127, 131 and 132, allowing Mythical and Sub-Legendary Pokémon Players will be able to get the Greninjite at Rank Y, the Delphoxite at Rank X, Chesnaughtite at Rank W, Baxcalibrite at Rank V and Sceptilite at Rank S

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Drop Event The next Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event is the latest Drop Event which features special Solo Battles with various rewards and missions to complete. It adds numerous new Promos into the game including the Mareep Promo card. It runs until January 11th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Mareep Drop Event event section.

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Monthly Subscription Pokémon TCG Pocket has started its new monthly run of Subscription Missions for players with the paid subscription. With this, the shop has updated with new Coins, Playmats, Sleeves, Display Boards & Binders featuring Mega Charizard Y Alongside this, a new exchange is live that will give players with the subscription the Ditto Promo

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Neo Champion Event The "Fishing Up A Golden New Year" Story Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event focuses on the New Year festivities in Pasio. It runs until January 19th 2026 and gives all players the Sync Pair of Linnea & Aromatisse To tie in with that, a new EX Fair Scout is available to get the Sync Pair of Ball Guy (Sygna Suit) & Hisuian Electrode We're currently compiling all details in our Fishing Up A Golden New Year event section

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE It has been confirmed that Meowth is to be available in Pokémon UNITE on January 9th 2026. Currently we don't have full details for them such as moves or stats but we'll provide full details as soon as they come

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters A new trainer has been added to Pokémon Masters EX's Trainer Lodge. From now on, if you have obtained Ball Guy & Amoonguss already, you have the ability to invite them into the Trainer Lodge to befriend. If you get the Friendship Level to 100, you will now be able to get the new Sync Pair, Ball Guy & Voltorb. We have updated our Trainer Lodge Topics page to include the points each topic will give you when you speak to Ball Guy Alongside this, a new Poké Fair Scout is now live allowing you to get the sync pair of Lance & Dragonite. This runs until February 1st 2026 A new Mix Scout has also begun which adds the Sync Pair of Elio & Decidueye into the game

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Drop Event The next Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event provides special New Year Event Missions based around login in that provide a variety of hourglasses and packs, as well as a booster packs for free from Mega Rising and Crimson Blaze. A special bundle is also available to get new Pikachu themed cosmetics for the New Year We're currently compiling all details in our New Year Event Missions event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Registration for the next Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Online Competition has begun. This is the Grand Challenge IV competition and is the fourth online competition of the season that give players a chance to earn Championship Points towards their 2026 Pokémon World Championships invite. This competition runs Regulation F rules Registration runs until January 8th at 23:59 UTC with battles following on January 9th - 11th. This competition also gives 100,000 League Points, a Gold Bottle Cap and an Ability Patch to all players who complete 3 or more battles

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the New Year's With Keldeo event and adds Keldeo into the game. This event is a Full Bellied Adventure event where you go through one minute cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until January 11th 2026 and features the New Year Lucky Wheel to get various rewards Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Alolan Vulpix (Festive Ceremony) We have begun compiling all details in our New Year's With Keldeo event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has added a new Monthly Goal Pass pass which offers a chance to get the Pokémon Raichu, which has now been added into the game, as well as max out its Outfit Grade as you complete it throughout the month.

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX Pokémon Masters EX has announced the next event. This event is the Fishing Up a Golden New Year event and introduces the Sync Pairs of Ball Guy (Sygna Suit) & Hisuian Electrode and Lana (New Year's 2026) & Shiny Dondozo (Tera: Dragon) into the game. It runs from January 1st 2026

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Co-op Event The "New Year's Battle" Co-op Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event features battles gainst a team of Horse Pokémon to celebrate the New Year Alongside this, a special New Year's Exclusive 5 Star Only lucky Slot and Select Master Fair Lucky Scout are available for a chance to get a variety of Master Sync Pairs We're currently compiling all details in our New Year's Battle event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, January 1st 2026, Alolan Vulpix's Festive Ceremony outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Pumpkin & Milk and Berry Jam gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This event is the New Year's 2026 Event event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on January 4th and features Party Hat Pokémon including Pikachu, Bulbasaur and Wobbuffet returning alongside Timed Research and a Collection Challenge We are compiling full details in our New Year's 2026 Event event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

This event is the New Year's 2026 Event event which runs from 10:00 local time on December 31st through 20:00 local time on January 4th and features the return of many costume Pokémon including Party Hat Wurmple and New Year's Hoothoot We are compiling full details in our New Year's 2026 Event event section

item.description:
29-12-2025 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 06:00 GMTEdit @ 05:31: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet | Edit @ 06:00: Pokémon Masters EX & Pokémon Café ReMix

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The next Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Online Competition has been announced. This competition is the Grand Challenge 2026 IV competition and runs standard Regulation F rules. Registration is open from 00:00 UTC on January 1st through January 8th at 23:59 UTC while battles run from 00:00 UTC on January 9th to 23:59 UTC on Januar 11th. This competition also gives 10,000 League Points to all players who complete 3 or more battles Players enrolled in the Pokémon Championship Series can earn Championship Points for ranking.

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest major Pokémon Sleep event, the New Years 2026 event is rolling out. This event runs until 03:59 local time on January 12th 2026. This event features boosts to all the Pokémon that were introduced in the game during 2025 with special features each week. This event also has the Pokémon in Sleep Research drop Dream Coins that can be used to exchange for items. We have all details to our New Years 2026 Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Ranked Damage Event The seventeenth Pokémon Masters EX Ranked Damage Event is now live. This event, Super Sparring, has you face off against one of three battles in order to earn points by inflicting high amounts of damage on the opponent. This runs until January 7th 2026 We're currently compiling all details in our Super Sparring event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until January 1st at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The third and final bingo reward panel is now live for the Treecko's Forest event in Pokémon Café ReMix. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Treecko's Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on January 1st 2026 We have full details in our Treecko's Forest event page

In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixty-first entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Johto Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the fourth generation. It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den. A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixty-first Pokémon, Wugtrio

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Drop Event The next Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event provides special Holiday Event Missions based around login in that provide a variety of hourglasses and packs, as well as a booster packs for free from Mega Rising and Crimson Blaze We're currently compiling all details in our Holiday Event Missions event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX The monthly special event has begun in Pokémon Masters EX. For one day only each month on the 25th, the Pokémon Masters Day event will be held. This event will give you a variety of rewards for completion. A sync Grid Expansion has happened for The Masked Royal & Incineroar. A Triple Feature Masters EX Scout is also available to get Brendan & Shiny Groudon, May & Shiny Kyogre and Steven & Shiny Rayquaza We've updated our Pokémon Masters Day page with the details of this month's event.

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Minun's Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on January 1st 2026 We have full details in our Treecko's Forest event page

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a new patch in order to alter a variety of Pokémon with various adjustments to a variety of Pokémon including Inteleon, Decidueye, Vaporeon and more. We've begun compiling all the changes of this patch in our Patch section

Until Next Time, See Ya

This is the second part of the Winter Holiday event which features more costume Pokémon spawns as well as the release of Rolycoly into the game We are compiling full details in our Winter Holiday 2025 Part 2 event section

item.description:
22-12-2025 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 21:01 GMTEdit @ 21:01: Pokémon GO

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest major Pokémon Sleep event, the Holiday 2025 event is rolling out. This event runs until 03:59 local time on December 29th 2026. This event features boosts to Ice and Steel-type Pokémon, as well as the introduction of Togedemaru, Cetoddle, Cetitan and Holiday Spheal into the game. We have all details to our Holiday 2025 Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Pokémon GO has revealed a new element to the coming New Year's 2026 event. With this event, Blacephalon will be in 5 Star Raid Battles and with this, its signature move of Mind Blown will become available. The move has 130 Power in Gyms & Raids and 90 Power in Trainer Battles, with a guarantee reduction in the user's Defense

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Sunday: Pokémon TCG Pocket - Emblem Event + Pokémon Masters EX - Battle Countdown + Pokémon Café ReMix - Treecko's Forest
item.description:
21-12-2025 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 13:00 GMTEdit @ 13:00: Pokémon of the Week

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Emblem Event The latest Pokémon TCG Pocket event is now live. This event, the Crimson Blaze Emblem Event, is the latest Emblem Event which features missions based upon battling other players over the Internet. It provides special Emblems based on your performance. It runs until December 31st 2025 We're currently compiling all details in our Crimson Blaze Emblem Event event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Special Event The "Battle Countdown" Special Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event features daily battles against a trio of Sync Pairs to get a variety of rewards including gems We're currently compiling all details in our Battle Countdown event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Treecko's Forest event and adds Treecko into the game. This event is a Café Pop-up event where you complete One Minute Cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until January 1st 2026 Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Galarian Ponyta (Holiday) We have begun compiling all details in our Treecko's Forest event section In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and sixtieth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Johto Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the fourth generation. It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had. It always carries its food with it, wherever it goes. If attacked, it throws its food at the opponent. It carries food rolled up in its tail. It has a habit of sharing food with people lost in the mountains. So, here it is, the one hundred and sixtieth Pokémon, Delibird

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon TCG - Nihil Zero + Pokémon GO - Celestial Research Day
item.description:
20-12-2025 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 10:38 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 10:38: Nihil Zero

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game The Pokémon Company have revealed the next Japanese Pokémon TCG set. This set is called Nihil Zero and conitunes the focus around Mega Zygarde. This set is due for release in Japan on January 23rd 2026 We have begun cataloguing all the known cards in our Nihil Zero set page with translations thanks to ToineLay

In The Games Department Pokémon GO - Research Day The Pokémon GO Celestial Research Day is rolling out globally. For three hours in each region, unique Field Research will appear at PokéStops which will give players encounters with Solrock or Lunatone. During this event, you will have a higher chance of encountering the Pokémon as Shiny and there is paid Timed Research to get even more encounters It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. We have full details in our Celestial Research Day page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next delivery focus. Starting from tomorrow, December 21st 2025, Galarian Ponyta's Holiday outfit will be added to the game through Delivery. It has the Pumpkin and Mousse gimmicks. We'll provide more details when the event goes live tomorrow

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Walking Wake & Iron Leaves Tera Raid Battle Event + Pokémon Sleep - New Moon Day
item.description:
19-12-2025 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check yesterday's update for more of our Mega Dimension Coverage. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 11:02 GMTEdit @ 06:00: Pokémon Café ReMix | Edit @ 07:00: Pokémon UNITE | Edit @ 11:02: Episode Details In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A Coverage The DLC has been out for a week now and our coverage is winding down to its conclusion. We'll still post any big discoveries we still find but minor changes will be amended quietly Our Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex, Legends: Z-A Attackdex are now updated with all the new details. The New Mega Evolutions and Hyperspace City Pokédex are also up to date as are pages like Ansha's Donuts Edit @ 07:50: Updated the Flavor Powers page to include precise details on the effects of more of the Powers Edit @ 17:38: Created a page on Moveset Changes for Pokémon that got new moves in their Level Up Learnset between the Version 1.0 and 2.0 versions of the game

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is a repeat of the special Raid event which offers battles against Walking Wake in Pokémon Scarlet & Iron Leaves in Pokémon Violet. You can only catch 1 of each per save file and if you caught them in a previous raid event then you can't catch them again. This event runs until January 4th 2026 at 23:59 UTC We have updated our section with full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features Friede recount what happened while he was away from the Rising Volt Tacklers, and challenges Roy to a battle. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Pokémon UNITE has received a update which adds a variety of things to the game. First, the Pokémon Mega Charizard Y is now available to obtain as a new unique Unite License. We're currently compiling full details for Mega Charizard Y in our Pokémon section for the game.

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The latest Pokémon Sleep New Moon Day event is starting to roll out. This event runs from 04:00 local time today until 03:59 local time on December 22nd and features a special boost where Pokémon will not become hungry straight away and has an increased Shiny chance. It also features increased spawns for Darkrai We have all details to our New Moon Day Event Page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has announced the next event. This event is Treecko's Forest and adds Treecko into the game. It is a Café Pop-Up Event which has you play slow cooking stages with special limits and bundles to purchase to get more points. It runs from December 21st 2025

In The Anime Department Pokémon Mega Voltage A new episode title has been released for a coming episode of Pokémon Rising Again in Japan. This episode is due to air on January 9th 2026. Episode 123: Shock and Horrors! Mochi Mayhem on the Ship

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 4 + Pokémon GO Winter Holiday Event
item.description:
18-12-2025 06:00 GMT / 01:00 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check yesterday's update for more of our Mega Dimension Coverage. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 18:00 GMTEdit @ 18:00: Pokémon GO In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A Coverage The DLC has been out for a week now and our coverage is winding down to its conclusion. We'll still post any big discoveries we still find but minor changes will be amended quietly Our Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex, Legends: Z-A Attackdex are now updated with all the new details. The New Mega Evolutions and Hyperspace City Pokédex are also up to date as are pages like Ansha's Donuts Edit @ 10:17: Updated the Hyperspace Lumiose Wild Zone page to include details on all spawns within each Legendary Zone

In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Ranked Battle Season 4 Pokémon Legends: Z-A's Ranked Battle Season 4 has begun. This season is the fourth for the Z-A Battle Club and features battles to get rewards by earning points in the battle, and allows for use of Pokémon from the Hyperspace Pokédex, and once again restricting Legendary Pokémon. This season will run until January 8th at 05:59 UTC Players who reach Rank Y will get a Greninjite, players who reach Rank V will get a Delphoxite and players who reach Rank U will get a Chesnaughtite. Players who reach Rank S will get a Baxcalibrite to Mega Evolve their Baxcalibur into Mega Baxcalibur , adding it into the game. We've added all known details in our Ranked Battle Season 4 section including available Pokémon and rewards

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep Pokémon Sleep has received a surprise update. This update has added a variety of things ahead of next week's event. This includes all data for the coming Holiday and New Year events as well as adding data for Togedemaru, Cetoddle, Cetitan & Spheal (Holidays)

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The Pokémon GO Pass: January has been announced. This will run from January 6th 2026 through February 3rd 2026. As before, a free track is available for all players who gain access, or you can purchase to get even more rewards The Pass will include encounters with Pokémon like Digalga, as well as Stardust, candy, Poké Balls, and if you purchase then you'll get a Lucky Trinket, additional encounters and premium items At Rank 25 you will be able to open 40 gifts a day, receive up to 125 gifts a day and hold up to 30 gifts in your bag. If you get the Deluxe pass, you will be able to open 50 a day, receive up to 150 a day from PokéStops and Gyms and hold up to 40 in your bag At Rank 50 you will get 2* Daily Adventure Incense duration At Rank 75 you will get additional rewards from raids and Max Battles in-person

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO events for January 2026 have been fully detailed. Genesect Burn Drive & Genesect Chill Drive will be in 5 Star Raids from January 5th through January 16th alongside Mega Blaziken Thundurus will be in Raids from January 16th through January 25th alongside Mega Sceptile Tornadus will be in Raids from January 25th to February 4th alongside Mega Ampharos Dynamax Drampa will be added on January 5th Events have also been revealed for the month The High Zaptitude event will run from January 13th through January 18th The Precious Pals event will run from January 20th through 25th The Precious Pals: Taken Over event will run from January 23rd through 25th The Into the Depths event will run from January 27th through February 1st

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out globally. This is the first part of the Winter Holiday event which features a special Event Pass to get various costume Pokémon, as well as the introduction of costume Sudowoodo and Charjabug into the game We are compiling full details in our Winter Holiday 2025 Part 1 event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The third and final bingo reward panel is now live for the Delibird's Delivery event in Pokémon Café ReMix. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Delibird's Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on December 21st 2025 We have full details in our Delibird's Delivery event page

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix event, Collect with Gholdengo, has made its repeated return. This event has Gimmighoul appear as icons in Main & Master Café stages. If you collect them, you can earn rewards including Gholdengo. It runs until December 11th at 05:59 UTC We have details in our Collect with Gholdengo event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Wednesday: Pokémon TCG Pocket - Crimson Blaze + Pokémon Sleep - New Year's Event
item.description:
17-12-2025 05:11 GMT / 00:11 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check yesterday's update for more of our Mega Dimension Coverage. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. All other native shiny imagery will come over the coming days

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket - Secluded Springs The new Pokémon TCG Pocket set, Crimson Blaze is now live in the game and so our coverage of this set is beginning. We're currently compiling full details of all the new additions to the game with this set so be sure to keep checking our section. Edit @ 07:25: We have added all the new Emblems and Themed Collections to the sections Edit @ 07:48: We have updated the Coins, Playmats, Sleeves, Display Boards & Binders sections with all the new cosmetics available right now Edit @ 08:23: We have added all the new Solo Battles to the sections

In The Pokémon Department Pokémon GOITA The Pokémon Company have released the special app for Pokémon GOITA on iOS and Android in Japan. Pokémon GOITA is a board game releasing tomorrow in Japan that fuses the classic board game, GOITA from Ishikawa in Japan with Pokémon. This app has been released to teach people have to play There are two modes to play. The first is the Test Mode which teaches you how to play and gives you a chance to unlock profile icons The Tournament Mode unlocks after you have been inducted into the hall of fame in the Test Mode to defeat teams one after another to get your longest win record The app utilises the soundtrack from Pokémon Red & Blue for background and sound effects We have begun covering this app in our Pokémon Goita section. Pages will be added over the next day so be sure to keep checking back Edit @ 09:50: Created a page on Play Pieces Edit @ 10:36: Created a page on the Game Modes

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the Pinch Perfect event and is due to run January 6th at 10:00 to January 11th at 20:00 local time and adds Klawf & Shiny Dhelmise into the game This event has 2* Catch Experience and increased chance of finding Shiny Corphish, Shiny Dwebble and Shiny Clauncher Corphish, Dwebble, Clauncher, Tirtouga and Archen will spawn in the wild Corphish, Dwebble & Clauncher will be in 1 Star Raids Dhelmise & Dondozo will be in 3 Star Raids Field Research will give Corphish, Dwebble, Clauncher & Klawf There will be Timed Research on three sets of days. January 6th & 7th offers Dwebble & Klawf, January 8th & 9th will get Corphish & Klawf and January 10th & 11th will get Clauncher & Klawf There will be Paid Timed Research to get 2 Premium Battle Passes and encounters with Corphish, Dwebble, Clauncher, Dhelmise, and Klawf

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Winter Holiday 2025 Part 1 event which runs from 10:00 local time on December 18th through 10:00 local time on December 24th and Adds costume Charjabug & Sudowoodo to the game We are compiling full details in our Winter Holiday 2025 Part 1 event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Sleep The next Pokémon Sleep event has been revealed. This is the New Year's 2026 and runs from December 29th at 04:00 local time through January 12th at 03:59 local time. This event focuses on Pokémon which got released in 2025. There will be an event exchange to exchange Dream Coins obtained by obtasining Sleep Styles for various items In Week 1, Candy from the first Sleep of the day will be increased by 50% and Main Skills will activate 25% more. Main Skills will be boosted in level by 1 In Week 2, Dream Shards from Sleep Research will increase by 50% and Final Strength of dishes will be increased by 25%. The Candy Cram-o-matic willa lso be around

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Story Event The "Joyful Music with Everyone" Story Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event focuses on the story of Lillie & Bugsy deciding to bring some musical flair to the holiday party. It runs until December 31st 2025 To tie in with that, a new Seasonal Scout is available tot ge a chance to get all prior Holiday Sync Pairs We're currently compiling all details in our Joyful Music with Everyone event section

Until Next Time, See Ya

The New Mega Evolutions and Hyperspace City Pokédex are also up to date as are pages like Ansha's Donuts Edit @ 17:37: Created a page on the Item Trader Edit @ 17:46: Updated the Items Listing, Item Database sections with some further details Edit @ 18:31: Updated the Items Listing, Item Database sections with location of the Thick Club

In The Pokémon Championship Series Department Pokémon Europe International Championships Registration for both Spectators and players is now open for the Pokémon Europe International Championships. These are being held in London on February 13th through February 15th and a badge is needed to gain access to the event. Multiday Spectator passes cost £30 each while a single day costs £15 A second competitor wave will go live tomorrow, December 17th at 09;00 UTC

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO Raid Day has been announced. It will run on January 10th 2026 from 14:00 to 17:00 local time, focused on the Pokémon Kyurem Reshiram, Zekrom, Black Kyurem and White Kyurem will appear in Raid Bosses, alternating each half hour, with the Kyurem offering Fusion Energy on defeating them Players will get up to 5 more additional Raid Passes from PokéStops and an Event ticket will be live for 8 more Raid Passes, 50% more experience, 2* more Stardust and more Rare Candy XL Reshiram will know Fusion Flare, Zekrom will know Fusion Bolt and Kyurem will know Glaciate

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The Pokémon Café ReMix Mischievous Hoopa event is now live. This is a Team event that focuses around the Pokémon Hoopa, offering a means to obtain and power it up with cookies by earning points by completing stages. It runs until December 21st 2025 We're adding full details to our Mischievous Hoopa event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The next Tera Raid Battle event has been announced for Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This event will feature a focus on the Pokémon Walking Wake if you play Pokémon Scarlet or Iron Leaves if you play Pokémon Violet. These will be in 5 Star Raids and can only be caught once. If previously caught, you can't catch another This event will run from 00:00 UTC on December 19th through 23:59 UTC on January 4th

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event has been announced. This is the New Years event and is due to run December 31st at 10:00 to January 4th at 20:00 local time This event has 2* Raid Experience and 2* Raid Stardust You will get an increased chance of Shiny Pikachu in a New years Hat Bulbasaur in a party hat, Jigglypuff in a ribbon, Hoohoot in a New Years hat and Pikachu in a New Years hat will spawn in the wild Pikachu in a New Years Hat, Wurmple in a Party Hat are in 1 Star Raids Raticate, Nidorino, Gengar and Wobbuffet in party hats will be in 3 Star Raids During the event, the Daily Field Research will award Lucky Egg or Incense The number of guaranteed lucky Pokémon will increased from 35 to 45 and Pokémon in storage from 2020 or earlier will be guaranteed lucky when traded within that limit There will be paid Timed Research to get 2 Premium Battle Passes, 3000 Stardust and encounters with Pikachu. You will also get an additional Raid Pass a day from Gyms

In The Games Department Pokémon HOME One more new Pokémon HOME medal has been officially revealed. This medal is available in South Korea as part of the Ditto's Secret Capsule Mansion event. At Lotte World from December 19th through January 12th you will be able to get the special medal

In The Games Department Pokémon Masters EX - Neo Champion Event The "The Hottest Present" Story Event has begun a run in Pokémon Masters EX. This event focuses on Arven being invited to the Pasio Holiday Party. It runs until December 31st 2025 To tie in with that, a new Seasonal Scout is available to get the Sync Pair of Arven (Holiday 2025) & Scovillain We're currently compiling all details in our The Hottest Present event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix The latest bingo panel is now live for Pokémon Café ReMix's currently running event. This panel gives a number of tasks which, if completed, give you Plusle's Stylish Snow outfit. These need to be completed before the event ends on December 21st 2025 We have full details in our Delibird's Delivery event page

Until Next Time, See Ya

For three hours in each region, all Power Spots will contain a Gigantamax Snorlax Max Battle. It also features Timed Research for paid ticket holders that offers experience and Max Mushrooms It runs from 2pm to 5pm in your local time. In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun a brand new Special Pass. This Pass can be purchased in the shop and allows for you to earn points to obtain vartious items including Tarts and Golden Acorns, as well as obtain Primarina In The Pokémon of the Week Department Who's That Pokémon Today marks the one hundred and fifty-ninth entry into the Generation IX competitive field with a Sinnoh Pokémon. These entries are created by the visitors for the visitors and then compiled by our writer Mestorn. To get involved, Click here for the discussion forum Today, we are covering a Pokémon introduced in the fourth generation. A frozen Mamoswine was dug from ice dating back 10,000 years. This Pokémon has been around a long, long, long time. A frozen one was dug up from soil dating back 10,000 years. It woke up, to much amazement. So, here it is, the one hundred and fifty-ninth Pokémon, Mamoswine

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Saturday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Mega Dimension Coverage Day 4
item.description:
13-12-2025 06:08 GMT / 01:08 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check yesterday's update for more of our Mega Dimension Coverage. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 20:11 GMT In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A Coverage Day 4 The DLC is now out in all regions. As such, our usual discoveries shall begin. If you want to remain unspoiled, do not visit the Legends: Z-A section until you have your game. Don't worry as blatant spoilers will NOT be on the home page. Our Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex, Legends: Z-A Attackdex are now updated with all the new details. The New Mega Evolutions and Hyperspace City Pokédex are also up to date as are pages like Ansha's Donuts Edit @ 06:12: Updated the page on Ansha's Donuts Edit @ 06:47: Updated Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex Pokéarth - Lumiose City's Hyperspace Lumiose page with some spawns we missed Edit @ 07:21: Updated the page on Gift Pokémon Edit @ 08:09: Compiled further comperehensive data on Side Missions, covering Side Missions 151-170 Edit @ 09:28: Updated the Trainer Customisation page with new options Edit @ 10:05: Compiled further comperehensive data on Side Missions, covering the rest of the Side Missions, 171-188 Edit @ 10:27: Added the new Side Missions to the Lumiose City Interactive Map Edit @ 14:02: Created a page on all Hyperspace Missions Edit @ 16:11: Updated the Useful Characters page Edit @ 16:18: Updated the Items Listing, Item Database sections with some more locations for rare items Edit @ 20;11: Added native imagery for all returning Pokémon in the game. Will add Shiny Pokémon over the next few days to a week Edit @ 22:17: Updated the Shiny Pokémon page. Full rates are to come in the coming days

In The Games Department Pokémon GO Today is Day 1 of the Pokémon GO City Safari events that are running across the globe. This event will run from 10:00 local time to 18:00 local time while giving Timed Research to get Eevee in an Explorer Hat. These events run in Sydney, Buenos Aires & Miami, with the contents being the same between all three. We've begun adding details on each respective page.

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Friday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Mega Dimension Coverage Day 3 + Pokémon Scarlet & Violet - Dragapult Raid Battle
item.description:
12-12-2025 00:00 GMT / 19:00 EST by Serebii. Be sure to check yesterday's update for more of our Mega Dimension Coverage. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 21:57 GMTEdit @ 06:44: Pokémon TCG | Edit @ 10;20: Character Biography | Edit @ 10:59: Episode Details In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A Coverage Day 3 The DLC is now out in all regions. As such, our usual discoveries shall begin. If you want to remain unspoiled, do not visit the Legends: Z-A section until you have your game. Don't worry as blatant spoilers will NOT be on the home page. Our Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex, Legends: Z-A Attackdex are now updated with all the new details. The New Mega Evolutions and Hyperspace City Pokédex are also up to date as are pages like Ansha's Donuts Edit @ 05:46: Updated the Lumiose City section to include trainer details Edit @ 06:06: Added full trainer details for all opponents in Hyperspace Lumiose Edit @ 07:14: Updated the In-Game Trades page Edit @ 09:17: Started compiling comperehensive data on Side Missions, covering Side Missions 120-130 Edit @ 10:28: Updated the Items Listing, Item Database sections with some more locations for rare items Edit @ 12:22: Compiled more comperehensive data on Side Missions, covering the more requested Side Missions, 188-200 Edit @ 14:07: Updated the Items Listing, Item Database sections with some more locations for rare item Edit @ 15:07: Created a page on Passive Ability-like Effects that some Pokémon have Edit @ 16:10: Adjusted locations in the Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex for Pokémon in the Hyperspace Pokédex to show minimum required star level Edit @ 16:49: Added a new Evolution Method Change Edit @ 18:37: Compiled further comperehensive data on Side Missions, covering Side Missions 131-150 Edit @ 20:49: Adjusted locations in the Pokémon Legends: Z-A Pokédex for Pokémon in the Lumiose Pokédex to show minimum required star level for finding them Edit @ 21:26: Updated Pokéarth - Lumiose City's Hyperspace Lumiose page with full spawn details Edit @ 21:57: Updated the Lumiose City Interactive Map with a new Pokémon that can be found in Lumiose City after a Side Mission

In The Games Department Pokémon Scarlet & Violet The latest Tera Raid Battle event is now live in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. This is the second week of the Mighty Dragapult event. This event has Dragapult appearing in 7 Star Raids with the Dragon Tera Type, with Blissey appearing as 5 Star Raids alongside it with Tera Shard rewards. As with other 7 Star Raid Battles, Dragapult can only be caught once per savefile This event runs until December 14th 2025 at 23:59 UTC We have full details of this Tera Raid Battle Event in our event section.

In The TCG Department Pokémon Trading Card Game The Pokémon Company have put out the full set lists for the Starter Deck 100 Battle Collection set, due for release in Japan next week. This set features over 740 cards including over 600 reprints of old cards, with new cards including Larry's Pokémon and the Mega Lumiose City First Partner Pokémon. We have begun compiling all the cards in our new Starter Deck 100 Battle Collection section with thanks to ToineLay for translations. Due to the sheer volume of this set, the full details will be added over the coming days

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons The latest episode has aired in Japan today. This episode features the Rising Volt Tacklers work together to rescue Friede. The AniméDex has been updated with the contents of this episode. Click the picture to go to the section but be warned however as it contains spoilers.

In The Anime Department Pokémon Horizons - Character Biography With the latest episode that aired in Japan, we have been able to update Friedes biography with a Pokémon that he obtained in this episode. Be warned as the biography contains spoilers

In The Games Department Pokémon UNITE Two new pieces of Holowear has been released for Pokémon UNITE. First is the Fairy-Tale Style Holowear for Mewtwo which is obtained in the Treasure Chest Challenge. The second is the Neo Street Style for Scizor which is obtained through special Event Missions. Both of these are Premium Holowear

Until Next Time, See Ya

item.title: Thursday: Pokémon Legends: Z-A - Mega Dimension Coverage Day 2
item.description:
11-12-2025 04:32 GMT / 23:32 EST by Serebii. This update will be amended throughout the day so be sure to check back. If you have any ideas for the site, be sure to send them in. Last Update: 21:44 GMTEdit @ 14:00: Pokémon TCG Pocket In The Games Department Pokémon Legends: Z-A Coverage Day 1 The Pokémon Legends: Z-A Mega Dimension patch is now live and our copy is downloading. As such, our usual discoveries shall begin. If you want to remain unspoiled, do not click the spoiler tag, nor visit the Legends: Z-A section until you have your game. Don't worry as blatant spoilers will NOT be on the home page.

Edit @ 04:33: Created a preliminary page on Evolution Method Changes Edit @ 05:29: Updated the Legendary & Mythical Pokémon page. Edit @ 07:30: Updated the Mable's Research Tasks page with more tasks Edit @ 12:05: Updated the Titles section Edit @ 15:15: Updated the Legendary & Mythical Pokémon page with the final non-random Legendary/Mythical Pokémon Edit @ 15:25: Updated the Side Missions page with correct numbering as well as all rewards Edit @ 16:04: Updated the TM Page with all locations of the new TMs Edit @ 16:32: Updated the Mega Stones page with full locations for all new stones Edit @ 16:46: Updated the Transfer Only Pokémon page Edit @ 17:10: Updated the Legendary & Mythical Pokémon page to include a recommended Berry recipe for the 5 donuts needed to be made to encounter Edit @ 17:41: Updated the Legendary & Mythical Pokémon page with details on Scanned Portals Edit @ 19:20: Updated the site's sections with native imagery for all the new Mega Evolutions Edit @ 20:12: Updated the Items Listing, Item Database and Pokéarth - Lumiose City sections with details on all items Edit @ 21:44: Updated the page on Rogue Mega Evolution Rematches Edit @ 22:13: Updated the Z-A Royale section with new trainers found within Promotion Matches in Infinite Royale

In The Games Department Pokémon TCG Pocket The latest set for Pokémon TCG Pocket has been officially revealed. This set is called and will release on December 17th 2025 and focuses Mega Charizard Y The Mareep Drop event will run from January 1st through January 11th The Heliolisk Wonder Pick Event will run from January 9th through January 19th The Mega Latios ex Drop Event will reun from January 17th through January 27th We have added all details and known cards to our Crimson Blaze set page

Footage

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO Community Day Classic on January 4th will focus on Piplup. This event will 25% Incubator Distance, 2* Catch Candy and double the chance to get XL Candy as well as 3 hours Incense and 1 hour Lure Modules Lure Modules. It will also give out the move Hydro Cannon to Empoleon. The Community Day runs at 2pm to 5pm in each local time zone

In The Games Department Pokémon GO The next Pokémon GO event is rolling out in Asia Pacific regions. This event is the Well Armed event which runs from 10:00 local time through 20:00 local time on December 16th and features the addition of Clobbopus & Grapploct through Global Challenges We are compiling full details in our Well Armed event section

In The Games Department Pokémon Café ReMix Pokémon Café ReMix has begun the next event. This event is the Delibird's Delivery event and adds Delibird into the game. This event is a Café Pop-up event where you complete One Minute Cooking stages to earn points to exchange for rewards. This event runs until December 21st 2025 Alongside this, a new Delivery Focus is live to get Alcremie (Holiday) We have begun compiling all details in our Delibird's delivery event section

Until Next Time, See Ya
